name: Mitch McConnell
subject: Peter, Texas is under siege
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
What do Chuck Schumer, Rosie O'Donnell, and Alyssa Milano have in common? They’re all colluding to flip the Senate blue... by way of one of the most reliable GOP strongholds. That’s right, Chuck Schumer has teamed up with elite Democrat donors from Hollywood to make sure handpicked candidate, MJ Hegar, flips Texas and BEATS Senator John Cornyn in November.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=43006207&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTYxMjI2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

What do Chuck Schumer, Rosie O'Donnell, and Alyssa Milano have in common?

They’re all colluding to flip the Senate blue... by way of one of the most reliable GOP strongholds.

That’s right, Chuck Schumer has teamed up with elite Democrat donors from Hollywood to make sure handpicked candidate, MJ Hegar, flips Texas and BEATS Senator John Cornyn in November.

I’m emailing you today because just last week, “Hollywood Hegar” won her runoff election and has seen an influx of cash pour into her campaign’s coffers, earmarked for one purpose alone: to ensure that Texas falls.

This is serious. Imagine how difficult holding onto our Senate majority will be if we lose TEXAS!

Peter, my request for you today is simple.

You have proven time and time again that you are a reliable conservative supporter, now I need you to spring into action. I was told that I could count on you in moments like these.

If you’re committed to preserving our Senate majority, I need you to chip in anything you can, right now, to help Senator Cornyn KEEP Texas. Will you do that, Peter? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMDYyMDcS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTYxMjI2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0

DEFEND THE MAJORITY http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMDYyMDcS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTYxMjI2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Chuck Schumer isn’t pinching pennies here.

No, he’s pumping millions into states like Texas. He really feels that the Senate majority is within his grasp.

He’s going to round up every last dollar he can from his band of coastal elite donors, and funnel them to MJ Hegar’s campaign to beat John Cornyn... even though she is a failed candidate with a RADICAL agenda.

Peter, if we lose Texas, we lose the Senate. We’d hand total control over to Chuck Schumer.

The simple truth is, I need John Cornyn in the Senate. And I need you to keep him there.

I know how much you don’t want that to happen. So now I need you to take immediate action to STOP it.

Will you chip in anything you can? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMDYyMDcS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMTYxMjI2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 I’m really counting on you.

subject: Manny Sethi caught on tape defending Obamacare
body:

Peter,Voters are finally learning the truth about Manny Sethi, a Massachusetts liberal who's been masquerading as a conservative in Tennessee's Republican Senate primary.Sethi applied to join the Obama-Biden Administration. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: My message to Mitch McConnell (voting rights)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
If you really want to honor John Lewis, reauthorize the Voting Rights Act immediately.
| | |
---
Friend,

John Lewis once said that our vote is "the most powerful non-violent tool we have to create a more perfect union."__**But right now, that right - which John fought and bled for - is under attack.**
The Voting Rights Act, which became law after the historic Bloody Sunday march, marked a watershed moment in our nation's history. This landmark legislation made discriminatory voting practices illegal - and ensured that Black Americans weren't blocked from the ballot box.
But in 2013, the Supreme Court's _Shelby County v. Holder _decision gutted the act, paving the way for scores of GOP-led voter-suppression laws across the country that have disproportionately affected and disenfranchised people of color - especially here in Georgia.
Republicans like Mitch McConnell have offered pious platitudes praising John Lewis' legacy while using their power to suppress the vote - and McConnell is currently _blocking_ the one bill that could end voter suppression laws nationwide.
**My message to McConnell is simple: If you really want to honor John Lewis, immediately reauthorize the Voting Rights Act, which has been sitting on your desk for over 200 days.**
With the most important election of our lifetimes fast approaching, we have to act NOW to defend voting rights - before it's too late. That's why I'm counting on you to join me in honoring John Lewis' legacy by speaking out today:
**[Please, if you're with me, add your name now to demand Mitch McConnell restore the Voting Rights Act and protect the right to vote for _all_ Americans!](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/warnock-vra-rw?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk431-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-vra%3Fcode%3Djtk431-su-nd")**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/warnock-vra-rw?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk431-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-vra%3Fcode%3Djtk431-su-nd")
---
Thank you, friend - in the words of John Lewis, I'm proud to have you on this team making "good trouble" with me.
Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e58c/288179be/987e333/348e7b52/1168485684/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031
---

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b35c/18e32a7f/4dabf1d4/7b212b82/1087544689/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b35c/18e32a7f/4dabf1d4/7b212b83/1087544689/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b35c/18e32a7f/4dabf1d4/7b212b80/1087544689/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b35c/18e32a7f/4dabf1d4/7b212b8c/1087544689/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b35c/18e32a7f/4dabf1d4/7b212b81/1087544689/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Team Joe
subject: What President Obama asked you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Did you get a chance to hear what President Obama said about our fight to elect Joe Biden as our next president? |
---
Peter --

Did you get a chance to hear what President Obama said about our fight to elect Joe Biden as our next president? [](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.17_B2_coh-graphic_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.17_B2_coh-graphic_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS") The truth is, he's exactly right. President Obama knows a thing or two about running for president, Peter, including just how tough -- and how expensive -- this race to defeat Donald Trump is shaping up to be. Look no further than the Trump campaign's current cash-on-hand advantage: [](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.17_B2_coh-graphic_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.17_B2_coh-graphic_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS") What these numbers tell us is that, while we've seen a surge of recent success in the polls and in our fundraising, we can't afford to slow down. Not even for a moment. Trump has spent his entire last three years in office campaigning for reelection, so we're still undoubtedly the underdogs in this race. | **July Biden for President Supporter Record**

The reason we're echoing President Obama's call to action right now is simple: We've reached a turning point in the race that could determine whether we can win the battle for the soul of this nation this November, or whether we'll cede four more years to Trump and his corrupt, divisive allies.

Together -- and only together -- can we build the grassroots campaign it will take to win this race. That's why, if you can afford to make your first investment in this campaign for the month of July, it'd make a big difference in what this team will be able to build and accomplish in time to make Joe Biden our next president.

**[Will you join President Obama in this fight by digging deep and, if you can afford to, donating $5 this month to support our work today? Any amount you can spare for this campaign today would be a tremendous help.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.17_B2_coh-graphic_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.17_B2_coh-graphic_X__F1_S1_C1_nonopen_RS")**

Thanks for everything you do -- let's keep the pressure on.

\-- Team Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da7a4/3264977019/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da7a3/3264977019/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da7a2/3264977019/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da7a1/3264977019/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da7a0/3264977019/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da79f/3264977019/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da79e/3264977019/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da79d/3264977019/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da79c/3264977019/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da79b/3264977019/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da79e/3264977019/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da79a/3264977019/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da79d/3264977019/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b886/1cd0ac28/17146e374/357da799/3264977019/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Team Hagerty
subject: #TeamHagerty Shares Tele-Town Hall With President Trump
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-tt/) July 21, 2020 **ICYMI: Tele-Town Hall With President Trump** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-r/) Last week, President Donald Trump joined #TeamHagerty for a tele-town hall to kick off early voting in Tennessee. While speaking to Bill and Tennesseans across the state, President Trump said, "I'm calling to tell everyone in Tennessee to get out and vote early. You can get out there and vote right now for Bill Hagerty for Senate... He was one of my earliest supporters. He worked on my campaign in 2016, and my transition after we won. He's been so great in so many ways."You can listen to the full tele-town hall [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-y/) **WATCH: Massachusetts Manny Sethi's True View On Obamacare** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-j/) Today, #TeamHagerty released a new ad exposing the real Massachusetts Manny Sethi, who says one thing and does another depending on where he lives and what is politically expedient at the time. Tennesseans cannot trust Massachusetts Manny. He has been masquerading as a conservative who supports President Trump when in reality he is the most liberal candidate in the race. Watch the ad **[HERE](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-t/)** and learn more about Massachusetts Manny **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-i/)** **Early Voting Is Happening Now** Early voting is underway in Tennessee for the Republican Senate Primary. #TeamHagerty is proud to have the support of Tennesseans, including over 1,000 local leaders in communities across the state. Make sure you get out to the polls and cast your ballot to send Bill to the U.S. Senate. You can find your polling location **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-d/)** **WATCH: This Madness Must Stop** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-h/) Our country is under attack as the angry liberal mob seeks to destroy the fabric of our country and erase our history. Next, they'll attack our religious statues and erase our religious freedoms. Now, more than ever, we need someone with a backbone to stand up to the angry mob and protect our conservative values. In the Senate, Bill will stand tall with President Trump to put an end to this madness and support our law enforcement officers, who risk their lives every day to keep our communities safe.Watch the ad [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-k/) **Join #TeamHagerty & Sen. Tom Cotton** This Friday, July 24, #TeamHagerty is hosting Senator Tom Cotton of Arkansas in Clarksville, Tennessee. Sen. Cotton is a good friend to #TeamHagerty and has spoken out about his support for Bill's campaign for Senate. You can listen to Bill and Sen. Cotton's recent tele-town hall [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-u/) You can also RSVP to join us in Clarksville******[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-o/)**** ** **Bill Hagerty On WRCB** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-m/) #TeamHagerty was STRONG in East Tennessee this weekend. With early voting kicking off last Friday, Bill had the opportunity to speak with supporters about the ways he will fight for our conservative values when he gets to the Senate. You can watch his interview with Chattanooga's WRCB [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-c/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-q/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-a/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-f/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-z/)** Trump Stumps for Hagerty in TN Senate Race -- 'Somebody Who Will Never Let You Down'**[Williamson Homepage:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-v/) **Donald Trump heaps praise onto Senate candidate Bill Hagerty as early voting begin**[Greeneville Sun:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-e/)** Hagerty Makes Campaign Stop In Greeneville**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-s/) **Carol Swain Commentary: Bill Hagerty Is My Choice for the U.S. Senate**[Chattanoogan:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-g/)** Bill Hagerty Speaks At The Hamilton County Republican Women Meeting Tuesday**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-w/)** Bill Hagerty Commemorates One Year Since Donald Trump's Endorsement Tweet**[Knoxville Focus:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-yd/)** Bill Hagerty stumps in Union County
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-yu/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-jl/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-jr/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-jy/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-jj/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-jt/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-ji/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-jd/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-jh/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-jk/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-tl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-tr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-ty/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-tj/)
---|---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215
[ Share ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-fb-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-ti/)
[ Tweet ](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-tw-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-td/)
[ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-pdtdyld-l-th)
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-pdtdyld-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-tk) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-u-pdtdyld-fuutjhhtj-il/)

body:
Not sure this is what Bill Hagerty wanted...
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdtzhy-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friend, A new poll released yesterday shows the state of our race unchanged - **we’re still in a dead heat.** | Latest Poll Results
---
Bill Hagerty | 30%
Dr. Manny Sethi | 27%
George Flinn | 3%
Unsure / Undecided | 32%

No matter how much money he puts behind them, Tennesseans aren’t buying Bill Hagerty’s smears. He’s been full-on attacking us for a week, and made zero headway.
That’s the good news.
**But here’s the bad news: Hagerty’s spending another $1.1 million dollars this week alone smearing me and our campaign. We have to fight back this week. **[**https://secure.winred.com/dr-manny-for-us-senate/new-poll**](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdtzhy-olhhkyhhid-j/)
[DONATE NOW - HELP US TAKE THE LEAD](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdtzhy-olhhkyhhid-t/)
Bill Hagerty’s attacks aren’t sticking on us. But ours stick on him - he’s an Establishment RINO who’s donated megabucks to Mitt Romney, and even Al Gore. He not only supports Common Core, his company made millions off of it.
He’s EXACTLY the kind of candidate conservatives don’t want.
That’s why we need to keep pushing. **People are already voting early, right now. We must make sure every Tennessee Republican gets the facts about Bill Hagerty before they mark their ballot.**
That’s why we’re asking for your help to get our ad in front of Tennessee voters during these critical days.
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdtzhy-olhhkyhhid-i/)

Watch our new ad now
[WATCH THE AD THAT WILL WIN THE ELECTION](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdtzhy-olhhkyhhid-d/)
Our grassroots campaign can’t call in millions from the banks, or empty our trust fund to buy more airtime. We’re counting on grassroots conservatives like you to get us across the finish line.
Friend, we are so, so close. Please - any amount you can give in these critical days will be a huge help. We’re counting on you.
[DONATE NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdtzhy-olhhkyhhid-h/)
Thanks for your support,
Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer
Campaign Manager
Dr. Manny for Senate

Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205

name: Dr. James St. George
subject: Check Out My Latest Commercial
body:
Friend,

Have you seen it? Our 2nd commercial has been up on TV for a bit now, but I wanted to make sure you didn't miss it! [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdjtudy-ojijtnthh-r/) It was a blast to shoot but more importantly, I get to tell you and other voters about my priorities as your next Congressman. With my expertise in healthcare and the ability to balance a budget, I am ready to defend our conservative values and shoot straight at any attempt to destroy our great nation.

Great achievements have been met in our campaign and our momentum is unmatched. Our grassroots efforts have hit every corner of the district and we are doubling down our efforts as we speak. We have new interns, more volunteers, a bigger field team, finished the quarter with the most cash on hand, and are rising in polls.

I have a great SHOT at winning this primary, but I cannot do it without your help. If you want a straight shooter who is ready to put **people over politics** ; consider contributing to our campaign in our effort to put a real conservative in office. [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdjtudy-ojijtnthh-y/) If you can't contribute monetarily, you can always help with your time. Without volunteers the campaign is impossible and your help could help push us over the finish line. Learn more about how you can help by clicking the link below. [BECOME A VOLUNTEER TODAY](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdjtudy-ojijtnthh-j/) We want to thank all of you for being a supporter of Dr. James St. George. Please be safe and do not hesitate to reach out to our campaign team with any questions or issues you wish to see addressed. We will continue to work tirelessly to tackle prominent issues in our community. And as always, we put people over politics. It would be an honor to have you vote Dr. James St.
George on August 18th!

Warmest Regards,
James | [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdjtudy-ojijtnthh-t/)| [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdjtudy-ojijtnthh-i/)| [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdjtudy-ojijtnthh-d/)
---|---|---
Physician, Businessman, Community Leader, Eagle Scout, Husband, Father, Christian, NRA-rated Marksman, Conservative, Republican... These are just a few of the words to describe Dr. James St. George. For more than a decade, James has served patients at his clinics throughout north Florida and played an active role in the medical community, helping to improve healthcare services throughout our area.
[Unsubscribe](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail19.com/t/r-u-jkdjtudy-ojijtnthh-h/)

name: Team Fitzgerald
subject: Your yard sign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Fitzgerald for Congress signs available for pickup or delivery No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-pdtydhl-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdtydhl-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,I'll be asking for your vote on August 11th. For those of you who would be willing to do a little more, putting up a yard sign, [volunteering](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdtydhl-ahkdjtlkr-y/), or [contributing to our campaign](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdtydhl-ahkdjtlkr-j/) to get the word out are all great options!If you'd like a yard sign - either the regular size or the larger 4x8 - we've got staff and volunteers throughout the 5th District who would be happy to bring one to you. Pickup locations:
> **Republican Party of Waukesha County**
> 1701 Pearl St. #5
> Waukesha
> Hours:
> Monday, Tuesday, Friday 9-5
> Wednesday & Thursday 9-7
> Saturday 9-noon
> **Jefferson County Republican Party Headquarters**
> 204 S. Water St.
> Watertown
> Hours:
> Tuesday 2-7, Thursday 2-7, Friday 12-5, Saturday 10-2.
> **Dodge County Republican Party**
> Call or email Christine for pick up (christineb4gop@gmail.com or 920-285-6311)
> **Washington County GOP HQ**
> 519 Hickory St.
> West Bend
> Hours:
> 11:30-1:30 Monday-Friday. Saturday 9-11:00. Call (262) 334-4150 first
> **Germantown Victory Office**
> W178 W9912 Rivercrest Dr. suite 100.
> Germantown
> Hours:
> Monday-Friday 9-4
> **Walworth GOP HQ:**
> 130 Center Street
> Whitewater
> Hours:
> Tuesday and Wednesday 10am to 2pm
Or, if you'd like a sign delivered to you, send an email to Staff@FitzgeraldForCongress.com and we'd be happy to arrange it for you. [Help Buy More Signs - $5](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdtydhl-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [Help Buy More Signs - $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pdtydhl-ahkdjtlkr-i/) Thanks for everything you do to keep us on the path to victory on Election Day!-Team Fitzgerald
## **Join The Fight**
• Receive Campaign Updates
• Volunteer
• Invite Your Friends
## **Support President Trump**
• Scott Fitzgerald was one of the earliest and most loyal Trump supporters in Wisconsin.
• President Trump needs allies like Scott Fitzgerald in Washington.
## **Forward and Share**

However, we aren’t wasting any time getting every eligible Hoosier the tools to vote by mail in the 2020 general election. **[Give $15 to help keep Hoosiers safe!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18351494/225830088/-211952933?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=FirstEmail.Buttons.7.22.20_15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI5NmUyZi0xMmNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gnq7r8PnYq9PIwMiHn94FlqpmvEBOUq87zHFd6dQpqo=)** We’re launching an outreach program to minimize the number of Dems at the ballot box this year by making sure eligible Hoosiers know they can vote by mail. This means:
1. Running a texting and phonebanking program to let every single eligible Hoosier know they can vote by mail
2. Sending eligible Hoosiers vote-by-mail applications
3. Providing ongoing support for Hoosiers voting by mail

But it takes resources to make calls, send texts, and mail applications. We need to raise $10,000 by Midnight on Friday to begin our first round of outreach. **[Will you give $10 to help start the 2020 Vote-by-Mail Outreach Program?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18351495/225830089/-211952933?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=FirstEmail.Buttons.7.22.20_10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWI5NmUyZi0xMmNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gnq7r8PnYq9PIwMiHn94FlqpmvEBOUq87zHFd6dQpqo=)** _Our Vote-by-Mail Outreach Program is 100% grassroots funded. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | = The 2020 Vote-by-Mail Outreach Program is officially underway. = Right now, COVID-19 cases are surging, and the GOP still hasn’t agreed to an expanded vote-by-mail general election. However, we aren’t wasting any time getting every eligible Hoosier the tools to vote by mail in the 2020 general election. = We’re launching an outreach program to minimize the number of Dems at the ballot box this year by making sure eligible Hoosiers know they can vote by mail. This means: 1. Running a texting and phonebanking program to let every single eligible Hoosier know they can vote by mail 2. Sending eligible Hoosiers vote-by-mail applications 3. Providing ongoing support for Hoosiers voting by mail But it takes resources to make calls, send texts, and mail applications. We need to raise $10,000 by Midnight on Friday to begin our first round of outreach. = Our Vote-by-Mail Outreach Program is 100% grassroots funded. We’re counting on donors like you to keep Hoosiers safe during this election. Dear Friend, One of Pete Sessions' stated goals is to balance the budget without raising taxes. This seems like a farcical statement since he left us with trillion-dollar deficits when his constituents fired him in 2018. But it is a veiled threat: the only way to accomplish it is to wipe out Medicare and Social Security. A recent study showed an estimated 659,000 Texans lost their health insurance from February to May, including thousands of our fellow Central Texans. 29% of adults in Texas under the age of 65 are estimated to be without insurance. I'll fight to break the link between employment and health insurance, make quality health care affordably available to every Texan and every American, and to protect Social Security. Sessions and his cronies will soon start using the budget deficit they helped create to try to cut vital services. We can't let them. _**[Demand Better. Pitch in now and help me beat Pete.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18351770/225838952/-1907457920?refcode=07202220_line&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWUyOGRlNy0xNWNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z4qWnvvK8Dnw0fTCrtt0xy5aIU6u1wIh8qjlLggG5Zg=)**_ _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | ONE TIME CONTRIBUTIONS | MONTHLY CONTRIBUTIONS

Last month, our average online donation was just $28. And this month, gifts to our campaign will have even greater impact. The generous couple who matched your donations in May was so impressed with your response, they want to do it again! This time they’ve been joined by some other supporters and are matching online donations up to $7,000. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Since day one, we’ve run a grassroots, people-focused campaign. That means we’re rejecting dark money donations and building this movement one donor and one supporter at a time. This is our opportunity to take that support and double it. We don’t get offers like this every day. I’m counting on you to make sure we’re able to unlock the full potential of this generous matching offer. = | = Thank you for being on Team Hicks. We’ll never stop working for the people of our community. \- Josh | | Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney. He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. = | | = | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

#
Great news, folks. **The AFL-CIO just endorsed Amy Kennedy for New Jersey’s 2nd Congressional District!** As one of the largest federation of unions representing workers all across the nation, Amy is proud to have their endorsement and support. [(If not, you can watch it here.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18357830/225942424/2095586502?refcode=em-200722-ad-3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTIxMGM0OS0zOWNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bT0_z34z-72M6VQGiTVz7bmWeoq1T1Hr4NdKNP3p_j4=) Though I deeply love our state, growing up in Mississippi wasn’t always easy. My twin sister, Michelle, and I were two of 18 Black students to first integrate Yazoo City High School, where I faced harassment ranging from students calling me racial slurs and beating me up, to teachers spraying me with fire extinguishers. Yes, even teachers. When I helped lead a walkout demanding my school hire Black teachers, the superintendent retaliated by docking my GPA just as I was trying to go to college. I grew in spite of those tough times to become the first Black Congressman from Mississippi since Reconstruction and the first (and only) Black U.S. secretary of agriculture in our country’s history. When I wasn’t serving in public office, I got involved in leading multiple non-profit organizations that lifted vulnerable Mississippians up by providing loans, food assistance, and more. My love for Mississippi runs deep, folks, in spite of our state’s troubling legacy. Because I’ve seen the progress that’s been hard won, and I know together, we can bring even more progress. **Mississippi has come so far. Now is not the time to turn back.** It’s 2020, and there’s still so much work left to do — but I believe in us. At the end of the day, I’m the only candidate in this race who openly and eagerly wants to move us forward, instead of glorifying the painful days of Mississippi’s past. My opponent Cindy Hyde-Smith has joked about public hangings, endorses voter suppression, and even referred to the confederacy as “the best of Mississippi’s history.” _Is that who we want representing us in the Senate?_ I’ll promise you this: I’m ready and willing to work on both sides of the aisle to do what’s right for the people of Mississippi and guide us into a brighter future – one in which folks can afford health care, get a great education, find a promising career, and easily make their voice heard at the ballot box. **Mississippi is changing, and November is our chance to usher in even more change. Will you support my people-powered campaign today with a contribution? name: Vote-by-Mail Update
subject: Will you stand with Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The soul of our democracy is at stake.
| | |
---
Friend, the soul of our democracy is at stake - and we need to make sure every single voice is heard at the ballot box this November.
But Republicans are launching an all-out assault on voting rights across the country, attacking vote-by-mail and forcing Americans to choose between their health and their rights. **That's why Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams are calling on YOU to help defend our right to vote before it's too late: **
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-vote-by-mail?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk388-su-nd")
This isn't just hypothetical, friend: With all the dirty voter-suppression tricks played in 2018, Stacey Abrams fell just _55,000_ votes short of winning her governor's race. We can't let history repeat itself - Democrats across the country have to speak out NOW.
**We need to hear from just 49 more Democrats in Georgia by midnight, but we're still missing your response. With the most important election of our lifetimes before us, please make your voice heard right now:**
| | **Will you stand with Stacey Abrams and Michelle Obama to demand universal vote-by-mail?**

name: Team Warner
subject: Mark your calendars: virtual town hall tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

The Senate is back in session, and Mark Warner is holding another Facebook Live Town Hall for his constituents tomorrow, July 23rd to share updates about his legislative priorities. All are welcome to join! Here are the details: | **Facebook Live Town Hall with Senator Mark Warner**
Thursday, July 23, 2020
4:45 PM ET
**[Click here to RSVP](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dba9/53d9897e/547117dc/1c885415/3230273631/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/290928/")**
---
Just because we're physically distancing doesn't mean we can't talk to one another -- or to our elected officials. Mark is looking forward to answering your questions about his work in the Senate.

Although this event is hosted on Facebook, you do **not** need a Facebook account to access the town hall. If you already have a question for Mark, you can respond directly to this email. He's looking forward to updating everyone on what he's been working on and making sure his constituents have the resources and information they need.

We hope you'll join us! **[Click here to sign up.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dba9/53d9897e/547117dc/1c885415/3230273631/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.mobilize.us/vavictory/event/290928/")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dba9/53d9897e/547117dc/1c885414/3230273631/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-townhall?refcode=20200722_e_1_fl__666__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dba9/53d9897e/547117dc/1c885413/3230273631/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: Real leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef3/7f51f7bc/41b881a0/4ef640da/1077585725/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

COVID-19 cases are skyrocketing in our country because so many of our leaders have failed to put Americans' health first. Like Sen. John Cornyn: He's been skipping meetings with nurses working on the front lines and picking pointless fights on Twitter. It's clear **he is not the leader Texas -- or America -- needs.**

But there's good news. MJ Hegar is ready to show Sen. Cornyn the door. **[Will you please pitch in now to help her bring some common sense to the Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef3/7f51f7bc/41b881a0/4ef640d9/1077585725/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigiegJuly?refcode=email_20200722.1nd__1778__&amount=10") **

MJ is a fellow veteran, someone who showed her commitment to this country by serving in uniform. As a combat search and rescue pilot, she faced life and death decisions every day.

MJ earned a Purple Heart and a Distinguished Flying Cross with Valor for her bravery and quick action in the face of danger -- so I know that in the Senate she'll always rise to the moment to protect Texans. **[Will you please pitch in to help her get there?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef3/7f51f7bc/41b881a0/4ef640d9/1077585725/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigiegJuly?refcode=email_20200722.1nd__1778__&amount=10")**

Look, MJ needs our help to win this race. Sen. Cornyn has been playing political games for 18 years, and now his Washington allies -- from Donald Trump, Jr. to the Koch network -- are paying him back. Sen. Cornyn has a $14.5 million war chest to spend on his reelection!

Politicians like Mitch McConnell and his right-hand man Sen. Cornyn have made it absolutely clear they're not willing to put the well-being of our country and our people over their political agendas.

I believe this country is better than that, that Texans are downright tired of Sen. Cornyn being a politician rather than a leader, and that's why I believe in MJ. **[Will you join me in supporting MJ right now? Let's send a real leader for Texas to the Senate.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef3/7f51f7bc/41b881a0/4ef640d9/1077585725/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigiegJuly?refcode=email_20200722.1nd__1778__&amount=10")**

Leadership doesn't come from a title, it comes from action. MJ and I are counting on you. Thank you,

Pete Buttigieg

| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef3/7f51f7bc/41b881a0/4ef640d9/1077585725/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-buttigiegJuly?refcode=email_20200722.1nd__1778__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef3/7f51f7bc/41b881a0/4ef640d8/1077585725/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1778&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef3/7f51f7bc/41b881a0/4ef640df/1077585725/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
---

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ef3/7f51f7bc/41b881a0/4ef640de/1077585725/VEsO/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").
---

I believe this country is better than that, that Texans are downright tired of Sen. Cornyn being a politician rather than a leader, and that's why I believe in MJ. "" Leadership doesn't come from a title, it comes from action. MJ and I are counting on you. Thank you, Pete Buttigieg | "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace?=
subject: Fwd: yesterday’s visit with VP Pence
body:
I’m incredibly excited that Vice President Pence chose to kickoff his election season with me in the Lowcountry at a place near and dear to my heart | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/2990e825fee0/how-we-flip-the-house-2088222?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e92202ed4a&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | Friends,

Wow - what an amazing day.

I’m incredibly excited that Vice President Pence chose to kickoff his election season with me in the Lowcountry at a place near and dear to my heart — The Citadel.

It was a truly special event, and I was honored to join the Vice President in reflecting on the importance of the spirit of service in a place that has taught so many South Carolinians (including myself) what it really means to serve.

The Vice President knows how crucial our district is to holding the line in the House, and knowing I can count on his support means the world to me.

I just have one question for you.

Will you help me make the most out of the Vice President’s visit? Chip in any amount at the link below to help us keep building momentum.

**[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-2088222/vice-president-pence-visit/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=d0dce6a9e2&e=f1831b4ca2)**

Thank you for your support,

Nancy Mace

**\- - - Forwarded message - - -**
From: Mara Mellstrom
Subject: VP Pence is visiting our district. Here’s why.
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=88bd79ef9e&e=f1831b4ca2)**
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=bef88d1427&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Hey,

_We have BIG news. _

**Vice President Pence is visiting the Lowcountry today because he knows that our race is one that Republicans absolutely must win if we want to take back the House. ** We're honored to have him visit our district and we want him to know that our grassroots movement is fired up, ready to go, and all in to restore principled, conservative leadership to the Lowcountry.
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=68cf55cae7&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [Chip in any amount to put the Lowcountry first](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=39c17aeea0&e=f1831b4ca2 "Chip in any amount to put the Lowcountry first")
---
| The Vice President has always been a strong supporter of our campaign and has had our backs since Day 1. He’s visited our district before — speaking at The Citadel in February for the annual Patriot Dinner where he offered Nancy his support.

_It was a special moment for our campaign, and for Nancy personally. When Nancy was waitressing at Waffle House, she never imagined that the Vice President of the United States would know who she was — let alone offer her his support in front of thousands of cadets. _

That dinner feels like a lifetime ago. Since then, we won our primary in historic fashion and our campaign has surged into the national spotlight.

We’re entering the home stretch of our campaign, and we need to make the most of opportunities like this.

[**That’s why we're asking you to show Vice President how strong our movement is and rush a donation to our campaign.**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=c277560c80&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [Rush a donation to our campaign as VP Pence arrives](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b7ea28e161&e=f1831b4ca2 "Rush a donation to our campaign as VP Pence arrives")
---
| **This visit is a big deal for our campaign and we want to make the most out of it, so I had our team set up a Money Bomb.**

_That means if you want to double your impact, you can pledge to donate the same amount on Thursday._
---
| [Join our Money Bomb](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f251b1afce&e=f1831b4ca2 "Join our Money Bomb")
---
| Thank you for your support — you’ll be hearing from us again soon.

Best,

Mara Mellstrom
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3d6ac1e829&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| **[WEBSITE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=a51e37afd1&e=f1831b4ca2) | [FACEBOOK](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=224723fa3c&e=f1831b4ca2) | [TWITTER](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=578b8f4573&e=f1831b4ca2) | **[**DONATE**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=5a82b9d2b9&e=f1831b4ca2)
---

name: Mackler Polling Dept
subject: SHOCKING RESULTS:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Tennessee is in play!
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c5/18d6a294/4c8cfa4d/26d7e8a9/749718187/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | [Poll: Majority of Tennesseans more likely to vote for candidate supporting background checks
\- Tennessee Lookout (7/20/20)](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c5/18d6a294/4c8cfa4d/26d7e896/749718187/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200722?refcode=jme200722_m_other&refcode2=107423") BREAKING: A new poll shows that Tennesseans __overwhelmingly__ support stronger background checks and are more likely to support a candidate who supports background checks, too. [_**James is the gun-safety candidate in this open U.S. Senate race. With 104 days left to go until Election Day, we need your help to send James to Washington. If you can, chip in today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c5/18d6a294/4c8cfa4d/26d7e896/749718187/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200722?refcode=jme200722_m_other&refcode2=107423") According to the poll, 80% of Tennessee voters -- including voters who cast ballots for Trump -- support background checks. 60% of Tennessee voters are more likely to support the U.S. Senate candidate who will support expanding background checks. **And that candidate is James Mackler!** James, like the vast majority of gun owners, supports expanding background checks. But folks, here's the problem: It's been more than 500 days since the House passed a bipartisan bill to do just that, and the NRA's Mitch McConnell _still_ hasn't brought it to a vote in the Senate. [_**We must elect new leaders and a new Senate Majority that will take action to reduce gun violence, and the path to that Majority runs _RIGHT THROUGH TENNESSEE_. If you can, chip in $5 today to send James to Washington.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c5/18d6a294/4c8cfa4d/26d7e896/749718187/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200722?refcode=jme200722_m_other&refcode2=107423") James Mackler is a combat veteran, a gun owner, and a father of two. He knows we can protect our Second Amendment rights and protect our communities from gun violence. And he knows we need a new majority in the Senate to do so. [_**Latest Tennessee polling shows momentum is on our side. Now, we need to keep it going through November. If you can, chip in $5 right now.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c5/18d6a294/4c8cfa4d/26d7e896/749718187/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200722?refcode=jme200722_m_other&refcode2=107423") Thanks, Team Mackler [_**P.S. Giffords PAC founder Congresswoman Gabby Giffords is joining James for a free virtual event TONIGHT. We hope you'll join us! RSVP here ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c5/18d6a294/4c8cfa4d/26d7e897/749718187/VEsA/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.eventbrite.com/e/the-road-to-universal-background-checks-tour-tennessee-tickets-113676162462?aff=watchlist")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Have you responded yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
As one of our top Hoosier supporters, we’re counting on your response. Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469534?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d7f89ce17f&e=1acd9bb3d6)

id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Did you see our team’s earlier email about our 2020 Election Survey?

As one of our top supporters, we want to hear from Hoosiers like you about what issues you think are most important this election cycle.

Will you help us by taking this short survey right now?

---
| [Take the Survey! >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e3946ad075&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Take the Survey! >>")
---
| We want to know what critical issues our candidates up and down the ballot should be focusing on. They want to make sure they’re responsive to their constituents and voters, so we’ll be sharing the results of this survey with them.

**This is a _great_ way to make sure that your voice is heard. Governor Holcomb says it best: “We’re the one and _only_ Party of Purpose and our focus remains squarely on people.”**

We’re looking forward to hearing from you!

Thanks for your continued support,

\- Your Indiana Republican Party

---

name: JoshHicksForCongress.com
subject: TONIGHT: Join Josh and the Progressive Turnout Project for a virtual town hall
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Today, Josh will be joining a virtual town hall with the Progressive Turnout Project, State Representative Cherlynn Stevenson, and Reverend Clark Williams. They will discuss how to reach voters in urban, suburban, and rural areas through virtual events, digital organizing, and old-school political outreach.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18360932/225991332/433702908?refcode=HIC_20200722_em_fr_ptpevent_all_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODk2ZjQ4MC00YWNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0s68fFt9sco-M2sIsLkrf0FpjwH4AsJ1eR5a2PqRf8=)
| | **Hey friend!** Since taking the campaign digital, we’ve been working on new ways to connect with folks across our district, hearing from people about their stories and struggles. Fighting for Kentucky's working people has been the focus of this campaign since day one. **Today, Josh will be joining a virtual town hall with the Progressive Turnout Project, State Representative Cherlynn Stevenson, and Reverend Clark Williams.** **But we’re still missing a very important guest — you.** So, our team wanted to send a special invitation. The details for the event tonight are below: **WHAT** : Virtual Town Hall with the Progressive Turnout Project!
**WHO** : Josh Hicks (Candidate for KY-06), Cherlynn Stevenson (Kentucky State Representative), and Reverend Clark Williams (Chair of The People’s Campaign)
**WHEN** : Wednesday, July 22 at 7pm ET on [_**Progressive Turnout Project’s Facebook page**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18360933/225991333/1801762323?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODk2ZjQ4MC00YWNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0s68fFt9sco-M2sIsLkrf0FpjwH4AsJ1eR5a2PqRf8=&emci=19d68ee7-3fcc-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=9896f480-4acc-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=15601662) The panelists will discuss how they are building a diverse coalition to drive increased turnout up and down the ticket — and how to reach voters in urban, suburban, and rural areas through virtual events, digital organizing, and old-school political outreach. **If you can’t join us for the event, but would still like to be supportive, please make a contribution to our[ _Voter Registration and Turnout Fund._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18360934/225991334/-46754211?refcode=HIC_20200722_em_fr_ptpevent_all_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODk2ZjQ4MC00YWNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H0s68fFt9sco-M2sIsLkrf0FpjwH4AsJ1eR5a2PqRf8=) ** We hope to see you tonight! name: Kamala Harris
subject: This November
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
I want Jon Ossoff fighting alongside me in the Senate. |
---
Friend,

Our nation is in crisis.

As I'm writing to you, amidst a public health emergency, President Trump is deploying unidentified federal troops to patrol our cities and snatch American citizens into unmarked vans on our streets.

We *must* win the White House and secure a majority in the U.S. Senate.

**That's why today I'm urging you to join me in supporting my friend Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate in Georgia.**

Jon is an investigative journalist and media executive whose company has exposed bribery, human traffickers, war crimes, and corporate abuses.

I've gotten to know Jon over the last few years, and his passion for exposing corruption and the abuse of power is EXACTLY what's called for in the Senate today.

I want Jon Ossoff to fight alongside me in the U.S. Senate. So I'm asking you to help: [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2155/5b2c1286/3dd7dc39/25f161ba/2915949171/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_22_end_kh?refcode=em_2020_07_22_end_kh_s2&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800")
_Since winning the Democratic nomination in a landslide, Jon has earned the endorsement of organizations like NARAL Pro-Choice America, Planned Parenthood, and the Human Rights Campaign._

**Friend, they all know what I know: Jon Ossoff is a champion of the people who will stand up to corruption and the abuse of power.**

Trump and Mitch McConnell know Jon is a threat. Republican super PACs have already committed more than $21 million to try to stop him. We need to show our grassroots power and equip Jon to hit back twice as hard.

**[Can you chip in $5 to elect Jon Ossoff and flip Georgia blue?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2155/5b2c1286/3dd7dc39/25f161ba/2915949171/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_22_end_kh?refcode=em_2020_07_22_end_kh_s2&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

---

---
| [Express Donate: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2155/5b2c1286/3dd7dc39/25f161be/2915949171/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_22_end_kh?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_07_22_end_kh_s2_100")
---
| [Or donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2155/5b2c1286/3dd7dc39/25f161c1/2915949171/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_22_end_kh?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_07_22_end_kh_s2_other")
---
**Friend, it's long past time to end Mitch McConnell's reign in the Senate.**

If Democrats win the Senate majority, we won't have to worry about another two years of extreme right-wing judges and disgraceful attempts to rip health care away from millions of Americans.

Instead, we will be able to make real progress on the issues that are important to us: making prescription drugs affordable, taking meaningful steps to combat the climate crisis, addressing police brutality, keeping our children safe from gun violence, and securing equal justice for all.

**Georgia is a key battleground state and Jon is running to win one of the most flippable seats in the Senate. For Democrats to win a Senate majority, we have to win this seat.**

**_And Jon has what it takes to win._**

**_But only with your help, friend._**

**[If you want to flip the Senate and end Mitch McConnell's majority, will you chip in $5 right now to elect Jon Ossoff in Georgia?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2155/5b2c1286/3dd7dc39/25f161ba/2915949171/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_22_end_kh?refcode=em_2020_07_22_end_kh_s2&amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800")**

Kamala

| |
---
| | The news of Trump deploying "secret police" in Portland to round up protestors exercising their First Amendment rights is nothing short of horrific.

The utilization of federal troops, the deliberate shroud of secrecy, and the blatant disregard for the constitution are all deeply concerning signals from the federal government that this administration not only stands against those of us who believe in justice and equality. In fact, they are willing to go to any lengths to smother our efforts to achieve it.

**My opponent is devoted to defending these horrific tactics from the Trump administration. **
---
|
---
| Kinzinger’s flippant “wow” is insulting to the people of this country and our constitution. Let me be clear with you. **I stand in firm opposition to everything this administration and its devotees like Adam Kinzinger have chosen to turn this country into.**

The people of Illinois' 16th district deserve a better representative. They deserve real leadership that they are not getting from Trump or Kinzinger. **Adam Kinzinger is devoted to the Republican Party and Donald Trump. I am devoted to the people of our district. **

Adam Kinzinger needs to be unseated, and I can't wait to do just that. [Can you chip in today to help me replace Adam Kinzinger?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=0cba34ce22&e=140a9b81e7)

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8a4/1cd0ac28/1717c35e8/357da2b3/1311650846/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8a4/1cd0ac28/1717c35e8/357da2b2/1311650846/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

subject: Team Collins Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR SENATE, INC
body:
Dear Friend,

July has been a busy month for Team Collins! Whether we're meeting with supporters across South Georgia or holding a rally in LaGrange, Georgia conservatives are turning out in full force for Doug! The spirit behind our campaign is incredible and it's only getting better. Doug continues to beat Kelly Loeffler in the polls and has out-raised her by a whopping $370,000!

But the knives are out. Kelly and her DC backers are spreading lies about Doug in an effort to fool Georgians into voting for a fake conservative.

WE CAN'T LET THAT HAPPEN (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins)

If we're going to win in November and send a true conservative like Doug to the Senate, we can't do it alone.

CLICK HERE TO HELP US CONTACT VOTERS AND LET THEM KNOW TO VOTE FOR DOUG COLLINS. (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins)

**
------------------------------------------------------------

Our Saturday in South Georgia began with a great crowd in Waycross followed by some Hog and Bones BBQ!

A packed house at the grand opening of the Pierce Co. GOP & Ware Co. GOP offices Saturday afternoon. Exciting to see so much momentum as we head toward November!
Shoutout to all the folks in LaGrange and West Point who came out for Team Collins last week!
Whether it's joining Doug at an upcoming event, contacting voters, or putting up a yard sign, we need your help! Visit our website (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins) or email us at grassroots@dougforgeorgia.com.

============================================================
DOUG IN THE NEWS
** ICYMI: "Collins with Commanding Lead in Senate Race" (https://www.ajc.com/blog/politics/georgia-senate-gary-black-endorses-doug-collins/WH8rgeh7ybXZsKWCLJEtPL/)
Despite being outspent $15.7 million to ZERO on TV, mail, and radio, Doug Collins has a nine-point lead in the jungle general election, and is up 19 points among Republican voters.

To read the full story ** click here (https://www.politico.com/newsletters/playbook-pm)
.
** ICYMI: Doug B (https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/georgia-senate-race-collins-nets-370000-loeffler-q2/story?id=71823028)
** lows Past Loeffler in Fundraising (https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/georgia-senate-race-collins-nets-370000-loeffler-q2/story?id=71823028)
Doug Collins has raised $1.3 million in the 2nd quarter of this year. This vastly outstripped Sen. Kelly Loeffler, who amassed only $912,000 in that same period-- $100,000 of that from political action committees and lobbyists.

"Raising money--especially from small donors--is a great barometer of support and it is clear that Doug has a dedicated grassroots army marching with him"
To read the full story** (https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/georgia-senate-race-collins-nets-370000-loeffler-q2/story?id=71823028)
** click here. (https://www.gainesvilletimes.com/news/badge-bar/us-rep-doug-collins-asks-investigation-fulton-da-over-rayshard-brooks-case/)
** Twitter (https://twitter.com/CollinsforGA)
** Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/collinsleads/)
** Website (http://collinsforga.com)
** YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCSdKpKukfg7KvkahRzxfSJA/featured)
Copyright © 2020 Collins for Senate, Inc., All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email as a supporter of Doug Collins.

Our mailing address is:
Collins for Senate, Inc.
PO Box 1295
Gainesville, GA 30503-1295
USA

subject: I'll support our commonwealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:
Friend, Our founding fathers created our government to serve we, the people. I believe in their vision -- that’s why I’m running for Congress to fight for our district. **Abigail Spanberger rejected our district and our voice when she voted to impeach President Trump and became Pelosi’s “yes man.”** **Spanberger hasn’t stood up for our commonwealth AT ALL.** Instead, she’s worked with Pelosi to advance the socialist agenda, which includes healthcare for illegals and the Green New Deal. **She even voted to _impeach_ our President.** Friend – this is the biggest House race of 2020. clean_body: Friend, Our founding fathers created our government to serve we, the people. I believe in their vision -- that’s why I’m running for Congress to fight for our district. Abigail Spanberger rejected our district and our voice when she voted to impeach President Trump and became Pelosi’s “yes man.” Spanberger hasn’t stood up for our commonwealth AT ALL. Instead, she’s worked with Pelosi to advance the socialist agenda, which includes healthcare for illegals and the Green New Deal. She even voted to impeach our President. Friend – this is the biggest House race of 2020. Pelosi’s PAC will throw EVERYTHING they can at our campaign. This is why we need 583 more donations to get prepared to take on Spanberger. Help me fight back. There are still 48 hours left to chip into our FIGHT FOR FREITAS FUND. Can you chip in today to make sure we’re prepared to take on Spanberger and Pelosi in November? Your support goes directly to making sure we’re prepared for November. The road to taking back the House runs right through our district. Thank you, Nick Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: It is Trump's Constitutional Duty to Enforce Federal Law and He Should
body:
"It is a solemn duty. It is what being the chief executive is all about." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e0b003162&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **It is Trump's Constitutional Duty to Enforce Federal Law And He Should**

“‘[H]e shall take Care that the Laws be faithfully executed.’ . . . The Constitution says the president _shall_ perform this obligation. We’re not talking about an option or something he may do or not do as he sees fit. It is a solemn duty. It is what being the chief executive is all about,” former Assistant U.S. Attorney Andrew McCarthy writes for Fox News.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1834d3853&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Pfizer said Wednesday it has signed a $1.95 billion pact to provide the U.S. government with 100 million doses of a COVID-19 vaccine. Americans will receive the vaccine for free, the pharmaceutical company said . . . Pfizer said it's on track to start the next safety and efficacy trial later this month, and is aiming to seek regulatory review as early as October,” Aimee Pichi writes for [CBS News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc0d3fce5a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---

right now to fuel our critical work?

Make no mistake: we can absolutely do this. We can turn out enough voters

Thanks for being with us in this fight.

— The Powered by People Team

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Hop on Zoom with me and Kamala
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Join our conversation on Monday.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8105%2E868730%2EqSwyZ9) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8105%2E868730%2EqSwyZ9)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, Kamala Harris has seen it all. As a local, state, and national leader, she's been a leading voice for progressive policies addressing police brutality, keeping communities safe from gun violence, issues surrounding Black maternal mortality, and fighting for environmental justice. **Suffice it to say, I think we'll have a lot to talk about when we get together on Zoom next week -- luckily, you're invited to join us.[Donate $25 -- or whatever feels right to you! -- and you'll be invited to join us on July 27th at 4:00 p.m. PT / 7:00 p.m. ET.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9794?t=5&akid=8105%2E868730%2EqSwyZ9)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9797?t=6&akid=8105%2E868730%2EqSwyZ9)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9798?t=7&akid=8105%2E868730%2EqSwyZ9)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9799?t=8&akid=8105%2E868730%2EqSwyZ9)
---
| | [$250 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9827?t=9&akid=8105%2E868730%2EqSwyZ9)
---
| [$500 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9841?t=10&akid=8105%2E868730%2EqSwyZ9)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9794?t=11&akid=8105%2E868730%2EqSwyZ9)
---
Both Kamala and I know what it's like to take on Donald Trump -- and we know what's at stake.
So it's probably no surprise we have similar mottos. Mine is: "Early to bed, early to rise, fight like hell and organize." Kamala's is: "Any fight -- any good fight -- is born out of optimism."
Both of us have our eyes on the prize -- and that prize is November 2020. As Kamala likes to say, "Justice is on the ballot."
Election Day is only a few months away, and it's time to talk about what's at stake and how we win. I'm so excited to do just that.
**[Join Kamala and me on Zoom next Monday, July 27th, at 4:00 p.m. PT / 7:00 p.m. ET by donating $25 -- or whatever you're comfortable with! -- right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9794?t=12&akid=8105%2E868730%2EqSwyZ9)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/9794?t=13&akid=8105%2E868730%2EqSwyZ9)

Peter,
Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, Hillary Clinton, my opponent and the rest of the Far Left think Maine is for the taking. They are spending an historic amount of money on advertising in order to push me and my team out of Maine. Everyday they blast our state's airwaves with false advertisements and lies. _**We must fight back.**_
**Because so many of us are staying at home right now, the need for radio, TV and online advertisements has never been greater. Peter, I need your help to keep my advertisements live on the air!**
[**$100 will help us stay up with radio ads for the next two weeks in Lubec >> **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMTU2MzQS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTY5OTE2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
