[**$200 supports our television ads in Freeport >> **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMTU2MzQS1&kn=22&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTY5OTE2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[**$2000 guarantees we can stay live with digital ads across Portland >> **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwMTU2MzQS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTY5OTE2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Susan Collins

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18362906/226038320/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA4YWNlZi01YmNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NYDNTScTj_wqAZ1xD3lBf2jpxr4gBP1xSUiGyKVbpcA=&emci=a0380f22-56cc-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=0f08acef-5bcc-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *
**We have an exciting campaign update for you, friend: The Daily Kos just upgraded our race from Lean Republican to Toss-Up! ** This is further proof that momentum is on our side and confirms what we know: we have what it takes to win in November, _but we need your help to keep this momentum going through Election Day_. | [DONATE ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18362907/226038321/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.22_NAS_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjA4YWNlZi01YmNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NYDNTScTj_wqAZ1xD3lBf2jpxr4gBP1xSUiGyKVbpcA=)
---

Our district has been held by Republicans for years. But the hardworking families of TX-22 are fighting for change every day -- _and in 2018, we ran the closest race a Democrat has ever run in our district._
**Now, we’re closer than ever to flipping this seat blue and bringing real leadership to our community --_and the country is taking note._**
We’ve built a strong grassroots network of support, friend. We’re carrying each other through a global crisis, and we’re demanding leadership on the issues that matter most to our families, from expanding access to healthcare to making sure our economic road to recovery prioritizes our families.
That’s the kind of agenda that is powering this movement in Texas. And that people-powered agenda has made the country take notice: _**We** ** can win this election**_**...**

clean_body: = | Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. We have an exciting campaign update for you, friend: The Daily Kos just upgraded our race from Lean Republican to Toss-Up! This is further proof that momentum is on our side and confirms what we know: we have what it takes to win in November, but we need your help to keep this momentum going through Election Day. | = Our district has been held by Republicans for years. But the hardworking families of TX-22 are fighting for change every day -- and in 2018, we ran the closest race a Democrat has ever run in our district. Now, we’re closer than ever to flipping this seat blue and bringing real leadership to our community --and the country is taking note. We’ve built a strong grassroots network of support, friend. We’re carrying each other through a global crisis, and we’re demanding leadership on the issues that matter most to our families, from expanding access to healthcare to making sure our economic road to recovery prioritizes our families. As you've probably seen, COVID-19 cases are on the rise in many regions across the country, even setting daily records for new cases in some states. But instead of focusing all of his time on our health and safety, Donald Trump is hitting the golf course.

We all know it didn't have to be this way, Peter. The coronavirus is not Donald Trump's fault, but his inept response to it has cost hundreds of thousands of lives and livelihoods.

So as we can see before our very eyes, leadership matters. And Donald Trump proves with every tweet, every press conference, every golf round, and every order he makes that he is unfit to lead, and that his position of power presents a danger to us all.

But, Peter, this November, we each have the power to do our part and defeat Donald Trump, win the battle for the soul of the nation, and put our country back on the road to progress.

We just need to ensure that we have the resources to get out the vote. No matter what the polls say, Donald Trump will not be easy to defeat at the end of the day. He still holds a three-year head start on fundraising, and has already spent tens of millions of dollars to attack Joe Biden in key Electoral College states.

**So today, we 're coming directly to you to help us make sure we have every single resource at our disposal to elect Joe Biden. body:

| | |
---
| Peter,
One of the biggest debates we're having right now in Texas and across the country is the discussion about what our schools will look like in the fall.

Should schools resume in-person classes? Are schools ready for online classes should they become necessary? Are you satisfied with the way government is handling this situation?

Please take two minutes to fill our our survey by either [**clicking here**](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=59633129f7&e=68aaeb0998), or on the image below.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Great Energy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/great-energy?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| |
# Thank you to everyone who joined us in Overland Park last night!

We had a great crowd of people who want to drain the swamp in Washington and return power to We The People! Kansans are showing that they want a senator who will go to Washington and work for them, not the special interests. You can feel the energy behind our campaign.

One thing I kept hearing last night was how negative my opponents have gotten and I could not agree more. As Republicans we need to stop beating up on each other and instead look to share what we will do in Washington. Every time we beat each other up, the only person who wins is Barbara Bollier. This is why our campaign has remained positive.

Dave

P.S. – I want to be able to get my message out to every Kansan. Please click on the logo below to find out how you can help.
[](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=037fc5dcd8&e=41f8e27552)

Kansans are showing that they want a senator who will go to Washington and work for them, not the special interests. You can feel the energy behind our campaign. One thing I kept hearing last night was how negative my opponents have gotten and I could not agree more. As Republicans we need to stop beating up on each other and instead look to share what we will do in Washington. Every time we beat each other up, the only person who wins is Barbara Bollier. This is why our campaign has remained positive. Dave P.S. – I want to be able to get my message out to every Kansan. Please click on the logo below to find out how you can help. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Lindstrom for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariannette?=
subject: NFIB endorses Miller-Meeks
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

Today, we are proud to accept the endorsement of the National Federation of Independent Business!

The NFIB, founded in 1943, is recognized as "the voice of small business" in government decision-making through advocacy. Its members are active in all 50 state capitals and Washington, D.C., to encourage legislation and policies to help small businesses in such areas as taxes, health care, regulatory reform, labor and the economy.

Small businesses are the economic engine that power so many communities across the Second District, our state and nation. As a former small business owner, I am honored to have the NFIB's endorsement and support, I think it's important that we elect legislators who understand how small businesses operate, and who offer real solutions to help small business owners as they endure this public health crisis and its uncertain aftermath.

If you are a small business owner, join our small-business coalition by clicking [here](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=943ef5b40c&e=16fac31a0f), or [contribute to our campaign.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=1ce50eace8&e=16fac31a0f)

I'm grateful for your support,

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz Forces YOU to Wear a Mask
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_forces_you_to_wear_a_mask&n=1)
---
Peter -- Governor Walz is [issuing a statewide mask mandate today](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=bGn5xbfQFE6rsvr_OINzCe4ZgOXbQWI4Fcd81kAi0Luhfib4uiphQZFacChL4epNMIIBTGF5Q3zSNVbV8PsJJCoF2yOn6sm40fwIw34tJqrPG33l8DRITrAkXUDTPKC0ldeJUFeogwnlhhkp19Rsvqllk4iUTSPYzZCf96t-64U&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_forces_you_to_wear_a_mask&n=2) in his 2pm press conference. Details on the consequences of violations and how the illegal order will be enforced is yet to be known. Where a Governor gets the power to force citizens to wear a piece of cloth is a mystery to anyone with a basic understanding of constitutional law. **Walz is showing his true disdain for democratic principles today by unilaterally issuing the illegal order. Democrats who purport to believe in democracy, are displaying their true love for authoritarian 'benevolent' dictatorship.** Walz waited until the Minnesota legislature adjourned until he issued his illegal order, thus leaving citizens without any legal recourse outside of the court system, which already has its own mask mandate. It's unlikely Walz will deputize a new mask enforcement agency today to carry out his order. Which means the responsibility of enforcement falls on local police departments who are already stressed from the tensions created by the BLM movement. Now they'll have to decide if they are going to enforce an illegal order. Is the science of preventing the spread of COVID by using masks settled? Minnesota's foremost expert Dr Mike Osterholm has made numerous statements on how non-N95 masks are not very effective in stopping the spread. **But let's assume he's wrong and Walz' "science" is better. Why is Walz waiting to issue the order until 2 pm? If this is about saving lives, how many people have died in the past two weeks as Walz mulled over the decision to issue a mask mandate?** It's clear that this is all about controlling people. Instead of a system of government where elected officials work for us and we tell them what to do, Walz is switching the paradigm around. Walz' One Minnesota vision is finally becoming clear to us. It's an anti-democratic, unconstitutional vision of compliance with his dictatorial orders. "Do as I say, or else!" Mask wearing and social distancing are his orders and violators will be prosecuted. It's time patriotic Minnesotans stand up to Governor Walz and hold him accountable for his abuse of power. Today, the formal legal effort to recall Walz will resume as a second proposed petition will be submitted to the Secretary of State. Walz must pay the price. Will you do me a favor? If you have not signed the petition to Recall Walz yet, please [click on the link](http://www.action4liberty.com/recall_walz?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_forces_you_to_wear_a_mask&n=3). If you already have signed it, will you send this email to friends and family who also want to see Walz recalled? **It's up to patriotic Minnesotans to stand against this authoritarian, tyrant-in-making Walz. Today, the order is mandating cloth coverings. Tomorrow, it's forcing coronavirus vaccinations. This is the WRONG direction for a free country.**
# [SIGN RECALL WALZ PETITION](http://www.action4liberty.com/recall_walz?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_forces_you_to_wear_a_mask&n=4)
**In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_forces_you_to_wear_a_mask&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_forces_you_to_wear_a_mask&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=walz_forces_you_to_wear_a_mask&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Senate Race Alert
subject: endorsements are POURING in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
This is huge >>
| | |
---
Friend, _The Washington Post_ just reported that winning in Georgia is key to taking back the Senate for Democrats. That's why these Democratic powerhouses are throwing their FULL support behind Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) - and counting on you to do the same:
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e598/288179be/9fc6b82/348e78e1/2512709065/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzU0LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk354-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Raphael is the strong leader Democrats need to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate - but Republicans are firing on _all_ cylinders to defeat him. GOP incumbent Kelly Loeffler is spending $20 MILLION of her own fortune to buy this seat, and a McConnell-linked super PAC is spending millions more.
**With polls showing this race locked in a statistical TIE, we need to raise another $11,384 by midnight tonight to make sure we pull ahead and WIN - but time is running out, and we're still falling incredibly short:**

clean_body: You don't want to miss this. | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | Trail Update | Friends, This weekend, I was happy to attend the Western Alachua Conservative Action Republican Candidate Forum. It was great to discuss my America First agenda and legislative priorities when elected. I always love seeing so many friends and supporters when I am out. This weekend, we also had a team of volunteers spread out across the district knocking doors. If you would like to volunteer, we have plenty of opportunities! Please look at our == for upcoming events. | | == | | == | We just released a brand new ad titled "Bootstraps" too. The ad details my life story growing up on a ranch and losing that ranch due to failed Obama policies. Please click on the image to the left to view the ad. I look forward to seeing many of you in the district this upcoming week. God bless, Kat | Building Team Kat | The Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund recently endorsed our campaign. You can read their statement below: "For the last eight years, Congressman Ted Yoho has served his constituents well. His was a strong conservative voice in the House of Representatives, and his shoes will not be easy to fill. His former Deputy Chief of Staff, Kat Cammack, is poised to take on that challenge, and we at Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund heartily endorse her effort." | | == | | | | == | The Republican Liberty Caucus recently endorsed my campaign and release the following statement. "The masks have come off, and the socialists are now operating in broad daylight in Washington, D.C.," said National RLC Chairman Matt Nye. "We are proud to endorse Kat in this race because we know she will fight for our values in Congress." | On Social Media | REQUEST A YARD SIGN! We have given out hundreds of yard signs in the district. Join the hundreds across the district and display your support with a yard sign! Please send us an mailto:faith@katforcongress.com with your name and address and we will get one to you! | == | In the News | == | | The Capitolist recently wrote about my ad titled "Bootstraps." "Republican congressional candidate Kat Cammack released her second campaign ad on Friday, touting her upbringing and work ethic that she says sets her apart from other candidates in the race for Florida 3rd Congressional District." | | | | Florida Politics wrote about my recent ad. "The Gainesville Republican is out with a more subdued video chronicling her upbringing and the experiences that led her to move to the district and work for current CD 3 U.S. Rep. Ted Yoho, first as his campaign manager and later as his deputy chief of staff." | | == | | | | == | Florida Politics wrote about my record fundraising quarter. "...a record report in Florida's 3rd Congressional District, where no candidate has previously raised more than $250,000 in outside money in one quarter." Please help us maintain this momentum by donating == | How You Can Help | Join Team Kat In the coming days and weeks, we will continue to build out Team Kat with volunteers from across the district. I would love to have you join our team! If you would like to help our team in any way, please click == to sign up today! | | == | == | | | | == | My team and I are excited to distribute more yard signs! We also will have a number of 4' x 4' and 4' x 8' signs available upon request. If you would like a sign for your yard, please click == to reserve your sign today. A member of my team will then deliver the sign to your home. Thank you for your support! | | | | | We are working hard to execute on a winning strategy, and every dollar raised helps us toward victory next month! If you are able, please consider clicking == to make a contribution to the campaign. As always, thank you for your incredible trust and support! | == | Send us an mailto:info@katforcongress.com Like us on == Follow us on == Follow us on == Visit our == Sincerely, | | Kat Cammack Candidate for Congress | | | | | == | | www.KatforCongress.com | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com powered by

| | Team, we’ve got bad news:
[Trump nominated extremist, unqualified William Pendley to head the Bureau of Land Management.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18364678/226079562/-1441376928?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDA5ZTExMS02ZmNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Vqpq4i07vt51KNkbAQxBCtCPC5hpk9MQPnKeDi3vKU=&emci=8dea3785-67cc-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=b009e111-6fcc-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=1295540)
William Pendley has spent the last 40 years undermining public lands protections, the Endangered Species Act, and the Clean Water Act as an anti-environmental lawyer.

[America’s public lands need responsible management – not an unqualified director who will sell our public lands to special interests.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18364679/226079563/-1441376928?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDA5ZTExMS02ZmNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Vqpq4i07vt51KNkbAQxBCtCPC5hpk9MQPnKeDi3vKU=&emci=8dea3785-67cc-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=b009e111-6fcc-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=1295540)

In Colorado, public lands are part of our history, culture, and economy. Michael is fighting against this incompetent nominee and the Trump Administration’s blatant disregard for our public lands, but he can’t do it alone.

[Add your name and stand with Michael in opposing the nomination of William Pendley to head the Bureau of Land Management >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18364680/226079564/-1441376928?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDA5ZTExMS02ZmNjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Vqpq4i07vt51KNkbAQxBCtCPC5hpk9MQPnKeDi3vKU=&emci=8dea3785-67cc-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=b009e111-6fcc-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=1295540)

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Representation is Restored
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, I am honored and humbled to announce that yesterday I was officially sworn in as the newest member of the 116th Congress.
This campaign has been long, and we have fought hard to ensure this district would have strong conservative leadership - and today we have it! New York's 27th Congressional District finally has representation again after over 250 days without it. I promise to serve this district, and my country, with honor and integrity, and to fight every single day to ensure the people, small businesses, and family farms of this district are supported and heard! As I work with our President every day to ensure Western New York reaches its full potential, I will also be continuing to campaign so that this district stays in strong republican hands - [and I need every one of you to help.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/61DOnlURWelDdha3StcaWg/blQgWTZP8922tgS8qvk97pCQ) We have three short months until November 3rd - being elected by the voters of NY-27 has already been the greatest honor of my life, and I look forward to being elected to a new term and continuing to serve. Let's celebrate this victory and get to work to ensure our future is protected for years to come! Thank you for your continued support! Sincerely, Chris Jacobs [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/sQ7CebZu7cUYp66KKI892Q3g/blQgWTZP8922tgS8qvk97pCQ)

clean_body: | Friend, I am honored and humbled to announce that yesterday I was officially sworn in as the newest member of the 116th Congress. This campaign has been long, and we have fought hard to ensure this district would have strong conservative leadership - and today we have it! New York's 27th Congressional District finally has representation again after over 250 days without it. I promise to serve this district, and my country, with honor and integrity, and to fight every single day to ensure the people, small businesses, and family farms of this district are supported and heard! As I work with our President every day to ensure Western New York reaches its full potential, I will also be continuing to campaign so that this district stays in strong republican hands - We have three short months until November 3rd - being elected by the voters of NY-27 has already been the greatest honor of my life, and I look forward to being elected to a new term and continuing to serve. Let's celebrate this victory and get to work to ensure our future is protected for years to come! Thank you for your continued support! Sincerely, Chris Jacobs * 5501 Camp Road P.O. Box 893 Hamburg, NY 14075-9998 PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS

name: =?utf-8?B?VGVhbSBTw6FuY2hleg==?=
subject: Keeping schools closed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Demand President Trump and Education Secretary Betsy DeVos keep our schools closed until COVID-19 is under control | SIGN YOUR NAME >>

Despite COVID-19 cases spiking across the country, the Trump Administration is dead set on reopening public schools. Make no mistake, reopening schools will endanger children and their family members, along with teachers, faculty members, and campus employees.

As a parent, Linda knows how tough distance learning is on students, educators, and parents, but reopening schools without proper safety precautions is not the answer.

We must heed the recommendations of public health experts who warn of a surge in outbreaks should students return to classrooms without proper measures in place.

Will you demand that the Trump Administration hold off on reopening public schools during the height of COVID-19?

Thank you for taking action,

-- Team Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Stand With Us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
body:
As a Navy SEAL who deployed five times to fight for our country, I am dedicated to keeping the American people safe. I’m continuing that fight now in [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=4199cac3e10843bbb2716a3079da456a&_e=LRoZ5osaAtbmCsEG-TpOZjuYqbo8NHHBnvkUrvgKWmOulb89T0CJ_LVzKrlElUUXcNH3D2vUsQhxeOgDMrGVafqC62PsWnYvTaMiIrLzNxqdpANFm4zlvBYCaxQUE87oMq_YxIH2TZ8GByCoCfeU2rNmMDVtWNvGrmeYLAj-tIZVS3MjLhbD65dgHUbn4ppZj9NiyVdd-zvI3qwRxv88PPCvUOBmuJGIdrsamvOfxNC10JNCT2fjOc-1leeD0nvhvatLH5gXSBEmzgA2DojKb9W33CjOwO4saatgZCk3fNlxWn29U_MNLz1-8clP-aVeKYxixPD3P4TdZkf6xs-j_A%3D%3D) Friend, As a Navy SEAL who deployed five times to fight for our country, I am dedicated to keeping the American people safe. I’m continuing that fight now in Congress. But radical Democrats are threatening the security of our country, advocating for open borders and defunding the police. **Americans must wake up to the reality of far-left extremists winning in November: the safety of our communities is at stake.** **[That’s why we need to elect leaders who will fight for border security and support our law enforcement officers.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=4199cac3e10843bbb2716a3079da456a&_e=LRoZ5osaAtbmCsEG-TpOZjuYqbo8NHHBnvkUrvgKWmOulb89T0CJ_LVzKrlElUUXcNH3D2vUsQhxeOgDMrGVafqC62PsWnYvTaMiIrLzNxqdpANFm4zlvBYCaxQUE87oUnfTFBH0DV_rKJ7tP2n6PtNXTUmOcbNjfkwLHOSnks4hFO9jp6eqxRSXscinMcs7_ZTxNbsUWVS_jEjJrtowI11ceOVNNAMgWSX2HH2MVRB75IcaftBR4YZyvb4hgDy4MB_jGm5TJurMtAkfhkSjzDGKu8WI_VJSPm4igaqv-6FV-aRHhqpbbRaqQHAATL1l1gN8muyJUiOBbggTYcXYLw%3D%3D)** Border security is critical to national security. But right now, the radical-left is trying to undermine our border security, advocating for open borders, a return to catch-and-release policies and sanctuary cities. [**_Meanwhile, we are witnessing in real time the effects of Democrat governance._** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=4199cac3e10843bbb2716a3079da456a&_e=LRoZ5osaAtbmCsEG-TpOZjuYqbo8NHHBnvkUrvgKWmOulb89T0CJ_LVzKrlElUUXcNH3D2vUsQhxeOgDMrGVafqC62PsWnYvTaMiIrLzNxqdpANFm4zlvBYCaxQUE87o_JgYKyY-zytz6qe5I0HEsW2m7uafzngQFRsB4NQGGy5-3fUxG2oq4NN_BHJ9caxQQfGLHp8N49YqJLkMt-1YN7nGxMa6Y8jAHAlDKfaocdAFF8Z5f3oXV3KSbxQGgUccvHuzsKrCtdGwNofzR95NeabsRVKw1zOQhqleuwDkogAOrVii_IDwpTR0CUgy1whYg1Nb9HihCzHuf4RKGde6kA%3D%3D)Radical calls to defund the police and constant demonization of law enforcement have resulted in a rise in crime that is tearing our communities apart. **Enough is enough.** It’s time we put the safety of our nation first. That’s exactly what my friend and colleague, Brian Fitzpatrick, is fighting for in Congress. As a former FBI Agent, Brian knows how to keep the American people safe from all enemies, both foreign and domestic. He is fighting to secure our borders, support our police officers, and keep our communities safe. Brian stands for strong border security, including physical barriers and increasing manpower to go against not just drugs and guns from cartels, but also criminals and terrorists. And as a former FBI agent, Brian supports giving our law enforcement officers the resources they need to keep the peace and maintain law and order, and is fighting back against radical efforts to dismantle police departments. **[And that’s why I stand with Brian.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=4199cac3e10843bbb2716a3079da456a&_e=LRoZ5osaAtbmCsEG-TpOZjuYqbo8NHHBnvkUrvgKWmOulb89T0CJ_LVzKrlElUUXcNH3D2vUsQhxeOgDMrGVafqC62PsWnYvTaMiIrLzNxqdpANFm4zlvBYCaxQUE87oek1Mx8LyuRlJoE90f8A-dLzibNOjoTCHycaOYBHPx1Zj5D2D1nehti4gIMYyPG_3sJ1J2xFHo3XfPshND4u8eaa8zIX1hn-XXGCPNSqqiSumB5SrqzyBzV93eg8tFV8lg_jHVXWvjJOP62L6lKys18ZDiEHlgfCD4eUIv4GIXUSPIys6TbcGTgDA0IDLAc_JnmD4OBZDC_Ai9QMKZBbziQ%3D%3D)** We need his leadership in Congress as we fight to secure our border and keep our families safe.

But right now, the radical-left is trying to undermine our border security, advocating for open borders, a return to catch-and-release policies and sanctuary cities. calls to defund the police and constant demonization of law enforcement have resulted in a rise in crime that is tearing our communities apart. Enough is enough. It’s time we put the safety of our nation first. That’s exactly what my friend and colleague, Brian Fitzpatrick, is fighting for in Congress. Friend,

The White House, Congress, and Senate are all up for grabs this year – _but there’s so much more hanging in the balance when we head to the polls this November._

**Our police officers need protection. Entrepreneurs and small businesses need support. And our country needs security against the rising threat of the Chinese Communist Party.**

That’s why I wanted to personally reach out to you today.

We’re launching a grassroots Election Day fund for **first-time donors** like yourself so that we have what it takes to win in November and provide America with the leadership it desperately needs at this moment.

_**Are you in, friend?**_
[**CHIP IN YOUR FIRST $5**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=644a6b4d8db5432b9f1ceff93919bf0f&_e=ljh5Wqf8RxaZ9AmEES6IhXb_hnu52pcnDaIOphZxtvJX8rH8EgqX9wmBPnScYSQ-9nF99MYEd3MtoWlenZmWCGQFUB6VyMorwJ42w7JCku5EMh-cnMTUc00cqgOeJVq4U3ObYn3WabQERwIS2YnJogawK9x3PePvXgZxLIIhqjl1Vu8crqkiv0RXYLHDBYFy2b6fqFsyJE2dy97nes6bI6ixxuY34Fqm3447PKa4tY20RdubqRV3khPMTOUQeol1mtHEuuHpK9npdEBQ2mLqaktfglR2TuTkAYUHwHfAUsw48nk1a3XU5vG37B3tPZRp4RwEpp7LBDTir6Z1ulNF4oXSyFt3r5yp2VJT5xkMzo0qCgvgQC3oWvTQW6-05MInGwm2g0sDll0poDJ2u6EwDsbUDzHFGKWUbTuJkhtYezZ0vVb2tp2BI_tkBH4EM56eoc3ioyQtrQzI0I1wSTsaHKgs1bBB6cJ1hLmqnolU88gY4eAtVlp2bhAx9shTBDzW)
There’s nothing normal about this election season we’re in.

Democrats have adopted the most radical, progressive, and dangerous agenda ever seen in this country – and it threatens the Constitution and the rule of law which have held America together for generations.

_**I’m talking about their demands to defund the police, endanger our communities, socialize our healthcare, and “cancel” any free speech they don’t agree with.**_

They’ll get their way if we don’t stand up – and that starts at the ballot box.

Will you take a stand with me today against the liberal agenda by becoming a first-time donor so that we have what it takes to win Illinois this November?
[**CHIP IN YOUR FIRST $5**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=644a6b4d8db5432b9f1ceff93919bf0f&_e=ljh5Wqf8RxaZ9AmEES6IhXb_hnu52pcnDaIOphZxtvJX8rH8EgqX9wmBPnScYSQ-9nF99MYEd3MtoWlenZmWCGQFUB6VyMorwJ42w7JCku5EMh-cnMTUc00cqgOeJVq4U3ObYn3WabQERwIS2YnJogawK9x3PePvXgZxLIIhqjl1Vu8crqkiv0RXYLHDBYFy2b6fqFsyJE2dy97nes6bI6ixxuY34Fqm3447PKa4tY20RdubqRV3khPMTOUQeol1mtHEuuHpK9npdEBQ2mLqaktfglR2TuTkAYUHwHfAUsxQn_qroTvaiB5SCtvbeh2dghoeQDcexirZPQfX-Ekp_7SvWswVF_zMQZ-USsKAtJ-z1xq0iy49rANMXWB_jtCmAIfapvSLd-DvcPm0e_stxScbcNu8q8B08d9jiHthK4M_REwOdtEcqLMgdWUGJoTcRciWvkmHQTR2KsdFAvdm4sd6xzZmG_7knF5Ly97xqpOA_ljynAPbnxI5uTtkzrix)

name: Mark Warner
subject: Listening to the data when reopening our schools.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Everyone wants schools to fully reopen for in-person instruction, but we need to acknowledge that the challenge facing our schools -- and our country -- is unprecedented.

Instead of offering the responsible, measured leadership the American people need right now, President Trump and Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos are threatening to force schools to fully reopen for in-person instruction, even if local jurisdictions have deemed that unsafe.

**Secretary DeVos is being willfully ignorant about the crisis we 're facing.** She claims _" there is nothing in the data that suggests it would not be appropriate to have kids in school,"_ as the Trump administration insists that all public schools reopen as usual this fall. But the data shows that coronavirus cases are hitting record-highs across the nation, and are still on the rise. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbad/53d9897e/546cd330/1c8857d8/2171567000/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-rubberstamp?refcode=20200722_f_1_nd__668__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
COVID-19 cases in the U.S.
Let me be clear: if we do this wrong, it'll hurt our communities, our economy, and set our country back. **So I 'm doing something about it.**

Tomorrow, I'm introducing a bill to make it absolutely clear to Donald Trump, Betsy DeVos, and anyone else in the Trump administration who would use the health and safety of our children as a bargaining chip: schools should open when local officials determine it's safe to do so. They should not reopen on the Trump administration's political schedule.

I want to make one other point clear here. The communities who feel the impact of this callous move by the Trump administration hardest are the school districts who are already struggling to afford the safety measures recommended by public health officials. I'm talking about low-income communities and communities of color, who are already being hit hardest by the coronavirus pandemic.

We can't afford to leave any of our children behind, and reopening too soon puts children, educators, and all those who work in our schools at risk. We can't afford to get this one wrong.

Thank you for your support.

-- Mark Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dbad/53d9897e/546cd330/1c8857c7/2171567000/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-rubberstamp?refcode=20200722_f_1_nd__668__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Let's keep Indiana open
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
President Trump said it perfectly yesterday. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/lets-keep-indiana-open?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| Hoosier Republicans,

President Trump said it perfectly yesterday – **“When you are not able to socially distance, wear a mask.”**

**It’s science. It’s patriotic. And it’s the action we must take in order to keep our economy opening across the state.**

---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=03ca26eb83&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [WATCH – President Trump: “Wear a mask.”](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f7008d149b&e=1acd9bb3d6 "WATCH – President Trump: “Wear a mask.”")
---
| Today, Governor Holcomb announced that in certain situations, Hoosiers will be required to wear a face covering when they’re in public spaces.

**Wearing a mask can help us prevent the transmission of the virus, prevent us from having to go back to stay-at-home orders, and it’s the next prudent step that we need to take as a state.**

This requirement applies to Hoosiers over the age of 8 in indoor public spaces, at commercial entities, using transportation services, or outside where you cannot socially distance. When in school, mask use will be required for our kids in grades 3 and up, for faculty and staff, and anyone in a school.

**And as Governor Holcomb said today, with ALL of us working together to prevent the spread of COVID-19, we can prevent Indiana from (like other states) needing to go backwards:**

---
| | **_"We have, as Hoosiers, worked very hard to get to where we are today. Businesses are open and operating at various levels of capacity, people are getting haircuts, we're eating in restaurants and we're working in all kinds of facilities, both large and small. And we want to keep it that way.

"We want businesses to stay open. We want more Hoosiers to continue this trend of going back safely to work. We don't want to dial it back or put it in reverse...or as some are, shutting down again. Face coverings can and will help us blunt this increase."_**
**-Governor Eric Holcomb**
---
| All along, Governor Holcomb has said that the data behind four guiding principles – hospitalizations, surge capacity, testing and contact tracing – will guide his decisions. Here’s where Indiana stands now:

_**Hospitalizations -** Daily admissions are **_up_** from 595 Hoosiers admitted on June 26 to 803 Hoosiers admitted on July 20.

**Surge Capacity** – Hospital capacity remains **_strong_** , with 36.6% ICU beds available and 82.% vents available

**Testing** – Indiana’s test positivity rate has **_increased_** to 7% (up from 4.3% on June 18). Indiana has 214 testing sites available, with 654,000 Hoosiers tested.

**Contact Tracing** \- Robust contact tracing **_continues_** , contacting all Hoosiers within 48-72 hours of a positive test._

Together, we can follow President Trump and Governor Holcomb’s lead. We can wear our masks, we can save lives, and we can keep Indiana’s economy on the path of reopening.

We don’t want to go back – and together, we can keep Indiana moving forward.

#MaskUpHoosiers,
-Indiana Republican Party

It’s patriotic. And it’s the action we must take in order to keep our economy opening across the state. | | "WATCH – President Trump: “Wear a mask.”" | Today, Governor Holcomb announced that in certain situations, Hoosiers will be required to wear a face covering when they’re in public spaces. Wearing a mask can help us prevent the transmission of the virus, prevent us from having to go back to stay-at-home orders, and it’s the next prudent step that we need to take as a state. This requirement applies to Hoosiers over the age of 8 in indoor public spaces, at commercial entities, using transportation services, or outside where you cannot socially distance. When in school, mask use will be required for our kids in grades 3 and up, for faculty and staff, and anyone in a school. And as Governor Holcomb said today, with ALL of us working together to prevent the spread of COVID-19, we can prevent Indiana from (like other states) needing to go backwards: | | "We have, as Hoosiers, worked very hard to get to where we are today. name: Sara Gideon
subject: I'm running to defeat Susan Collins -- and I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there, I'm running for Senate because I believe the people of Maine deserve a leader who will put their interests first at every turn. Together, we have the power to defeat Susan Collins.
For the past eight years serving in Maine's House of Representatives, I've worked to pass protections for Mainers with preexisting conditions, expand Medicaid, and address the threats posed by climate change. **Meanwhile, Susan Collins stood with Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell, casting critical votes to pass a massive corporate tax giveaway and confirm Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.**
Now, here's the thing: Mitch McConnell knows this Senate seat is crucial to maintaining his majority and his power, and right now, the GOP is pouring millions of dollars into Maine to boost Susan Collins' reelection campaign. That is why I need your support today, everyone, because Maine is essential in our path to flipping the Senate.
[**Will you split a $3 donation between my campaign for Senate and Senator Hassan's today? Contributions like yours are fueling campaigns like ours nationwide, and as we scale up our operations to meet the demands of the general election, we 're really counting on your support.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc585/2a380d31/2369f289/f0aa12/2076902859/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDcyMl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20200722_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Sara Gideon and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc585/2a380d31/2369f289/f0aa13/2076902859/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDcyMl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20200722_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc585/2a380d31/2369f289/f0aa1c/2076902859/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDcyMl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20200722_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc585/2a380d31/2369f289/f0aa1d/2076902859/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDcyMl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20200722_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc585/2a380d31/2369f289/f0aa12/2076902859/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDcyMl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20200722_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
**Democrats need to flip the Senate if there is any chance of making the bold, progressive changes our country so desperately needs. Letting Republicans like Susan Collins maintain their stranglehold on the Senate --_even if Joe Biden wins_ -- could stall and obstruct our progress at every turn.**
But taking back the White House, flipping the Senate, and winning seats down-ballot is going to take a big, inclusive, and energized group effort. Now with just over three months left until Election Day, there is not a second to waste. Democrats like me are counting on supporters like you to step up today and donate whatever you can because every contribution makes a difference in this fight.
[**We deserve leaders who will put working families before their special interest donors and who understand that serving in public office means serving the people. Please, split a $3 donation between my campaign for Senate and Senator Hassan's today so that we can flip this seat and protect & elect vulnerable Democrats.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc585/2a380d31/2369f289/f0aa12/2076902859/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0c2ciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDcyMl9td2g0c2dfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4sg?refcode=e20200722_mwh4sg_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you for your support,
Sara
Sara Gideon

U.S. Senate candidate, Maine

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name if you agree: Congress must take these bold steps to address the pandemic and ensure relief for working people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
That gave us time to take the steps needed to address the pandemic -- but Donald Trump squandered it, refusing to issue national stay-at-home guidelines, failing to set up a national testing operation | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250f0/45c30650/1cc5d7119/66e8730a/180268101/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
| **We wanted to make sure you saw Elizabeth's message in the New York Times about how our government needs to respond to the pandemic and economic crisis. Take a look below.**

**[And if you're ready to support Warren Democrats like Elizabeth who know that we need to meet this moment with bold reforms, add your name here.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250f0/45c30650/1cc5d7119/66e8730d/180268101/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxNlBfU0dOX0NPVl9FXzIwMjAwNzIxX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-covid-nyt?source=EMT16P_SGN_COV_E_20200721_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
---

Americans stayed at home and sacrificed for months to flatten the curve and prevent the spread of the coronavirus.

That gave us time to take the steps needed to address the pandemic -- but Donald Trump squandered it, refusing to issue national stay-at-home guidelines, failing to set up a national testing operation and fumbling production of personal protective equipment. Now, Congress must again act as this continues to spiral out of control.

Those who frame the debate as one of health versus economics are missing the point. It is not possible to fix the economy without first containing the virus.

**We need a bold, ambitious legislative response that does four things:**
1. Brings the virus under control
2. Gets our schools, child care centers, businesses, and state and local governments the resources they need
3. Addresses the burdens on communities of color
4. Supports struggling families who don't know when the next paycheck will come

**But Washington won't do anything unless a grassroots movement demands it.**

[Add your name if you agree: Congress must take these bold steps to address the pandemic and ensure relief for working people.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250f0/45c30650/1cc5d7119/66e8730d/180268101/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxNlBfU0dOX0NPVl9FXzIwMjAwNzIxX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-covid-nyt?source=EMT16P_SGN_COV_E_20200721_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Here's what the next federal response must include:

**Start with funding the robust public health measures we know will work to address this crisis:** ramped-up testing, a national contact-tracing program and supply-chain investments to resolve medical supply shortages. Without these measures, we will not be able to adequately reopen safely, more people will die and there will be no economic recovery.

Our schools face enormous challenges, like figuring out whether and how to safely reopen, how to help students who fell further behind because of distance learning -- disproportionately students of color. The next legislative package should include **at least $500 billion to stabilize state and local governments and at least $175 billion for our public schools to help them reopen safely, avoid teacher layoffs, and provide the mental health and other services our children require.**

No one can reopen schools by just snapping fingers. No matter what Betsy DeVos says.

Parents are drowning. Child care centers and schools are closed, yet essential workers are expected to still go to work each day, or night. Even parents who can work from home are expected to feed the baby and help their children learn while participating in Zoom calls. We cannot begin to have a recovery without affordable child care. The next relief package must include **$50 billion in emergency support to keep child care providers in business now and make long-term investments so more families can find affordable, high-quality and safe care in the future.**

Rather than bullying businesses into reopening, then shielding them from liability when people inevitably get sick and die, let's instead make sure they have the resources necessary to put the health and security of their workers first, and enforceable safety standards set by OSHA. **The Essential Workers Bill of Rights, which I proposed with Representative Ro Khanna, would include federal money for hazard pay, sick leave, family and medical leave, and enforceable health and safety protections for all essential workers.**

While the virus continues to rage, **extended unemployment coverage** is critical. Rather than set arbitrary expiration dates for unemployment insurance, let's tie those benefits to real-time economic data. Families would be better off and we'd be investing in a stronger economic recovery.

**The structural racism that has long existed in this country has caused the pandemic to hit Black and Latino neighborhoods and Indian Country especially hard.** The next relief package must include Senate Democrats' proposal for **at least $350 billion immediately invested in these communities.**

To avoid a tsunami that could put millions of people out on the street, Congress should **extend and expand the national eviction moratorium, provide emergency rental assistance, and increase funding for families experiencing homelessness.** We should **broadly cancel student loan debt** so families don't have a student debt bomb waiting for them on the other side of this pandemic -- a burden that again falls disproportionately on students of color.

Americans are generous, but if they're going to put up taxpayer money during this pandemic, we need **strong anti-corruption protections** like my CORE Act to make sure a bunch of Trump-connected businesses that can hire armies of lobbyists can't swoop up big chunks of relief funding.

Our constituents are counting on us to deliver the relief they desperately need. The House passed a relief bill over two months ago. Now the Senate must act to contain the virus and to provide the funding so that our economy, our schools and our families can begin to recover. This is about saving lives and livelihoods -- and we don't have time to waste.

[If you agree that our government must take bold action -- to contain the pandemic and rebuild our economy -- add your name here to demand it.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250f0/45c30650/1cc5d7119/66e8730d/180268101/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQxNlBfU0dOX0NPVl9FXzIwMjAwNzIxX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-covid-nyt?source=EMT16P_SGN_COV_E_20200721_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: That gave us time to take the steps needed to address the pandemic -- but Donald Trump squandered it, refusing to issue national stay-at-home guidelines, failing to set up a national testing operation | | | "" | We wanted to make sure you saw Elizabeth's message in the New York Times about how our government needs to respond to the pandemic and economic crisis. Take a look below. "" Americans stayed at home and sacrificed for months to flatten the curve and prevent the spread of the coronavirus. That gave us time to take the steps needed to address the pandemic -- but Donald Trump squandered it, refusing to issue national stay-at-home guidelines, failing to set up a national testing operation and fumbling production of personal protective equipment. Now, Congress must again act as this continues to spiral out of control. Those who frame the debate as one of health versus economics are missing the point. It is not possible to fix the economy without first containing the virus. We need a bold, ambitious legislative response that does four things: 1. Brings the virus under control 2. Gets our schools, child care centers, businesses, and state and local governments the resources they need 3. Addresses the burdens on communities of color 4. Supports struggling families who don't know when the next paycheck will come But Washington won't do anything unless a grassroots movement demands it. "" Here's what the next federal response must include: Start with funding the robust public health measures we know will work to address this crisis: ramped-up testing, a national contact-tracing program and supply-chain investments to resolve medical supply shortages. Without these measures, we will not be able to adequately reopen safely, more people will die and there will be no economic recovery. Our schools face enormous challenges, like figuring out whether and how to safely reopen, how to help students who fell further behind because of distance learning -- disproportionately students of color. The next legislative package should include at least $500 billion to stabilize state and local governments and at least $175 billion for our public schools to help them reopen safely, avoid teacher layoffs, and provide the mental health and other services our children require. No one can reopen schools by just snapping fingers. No matter what Betsy DeVos says. Parents are drowning. Child care centers and schools are closed, yet essential workers are expected to still go to work each day, or night. Even parents who can work from home are expected to feed the baby and help their children learn while participating in Zoom calls. We cannot begin to have a recovery without affordable child care. The next relief package must include $50 billion in emergency support to keep child care providers in business now and make long-term investments so more families can find affordable, high-quality and safe care in the future. Rather than bullying businesses into reopening, then shielding them from liability when people inevitably get sick and die, let's instead make sure they have the resources necessary to put the health and security of their workers first, and enforceable safety standards set by OSHA. The Essential Workers Bill of Rights, which I proposed with Representative Ro Khanna, would include federal money for hazard pay, sick leave, family and medical leave, and enforceable health and safety protections for all essential workers. While the virus continues to rage, extended unemployment coverage is critical. Rather than set arbitrary expiration dates for unemployment insurance, let's tie those benefits to real-time economic data. Families would be better off and we'd be investing in a stronger economic recovery. The structural racism that has long existed in this country has caused the pandemic to hit Black and Latino neighborhoods and Indian Country especially hard. The next relief package must include Senate Democrats' proposal for at least $350 billion immediately invested in these communities. To avoid a tsunami that could put millions of people out on the street, Congress should extend and expand the national eviction moratorium, provide emergency rental assistance, and increase funding for families experiencing homelessness. We should broadly cancel student loan debt so families don't have a student debt bomb waiting for them on the other side of this pandemic -- a burden that again falls disproportionately on students of color. Americans are generous, but if they're going to put up taxpayer money during this pandemic, we need strong anti-corruption protections like my CORE Act to make sure a bunch of Trump-connected businesses that can hire armies of lobbyists can't swoop up big chunks of relief funding. Our constituents are counting on us to deliver the relief they desperately need. The House passed a relief bill over two months ago. Now the Senate must act to contain the virus and to provide the funding so that our economy, our schools and our families can begin to recover. This is about saving lives and livelihoods -- and we don't have time to waste. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

subject: Re: Unconscionable

body:
Stand with Jon. |
---
Friend,

**We're still in disbelief that Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp is banning local officials from requiring face masks in grocery stores, shops, restaurants, bars, and public buildings.**

Jon has spoken with multiple mayors here in Georgia who are deeply concerned by declining hospital and first-responder capacity -- _and they are STUNNED by Kemp's attempt to prevent them from implementing the recommendations of public health experts._

**[Right now, will you sign Jon's petition to tell Gov. Kemp to abandon his ridiculous attack on local mask requirements?>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e212b/5b2c1286/3dd9fd9d/25f1601c/2415898696/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/face-mask-ban")**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e212b/5b2c1286/3dd9fd9d/25f1601c/2415898696/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/face-mask-ban")
---
Thank you,

Team Ossoff

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

From: SERIOUS [via Jon Ossoff HQ]
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Date: Friday, July 17
Subject: Unconscionable

Hi friend,

**This week, Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp signed an executive order PROHIBITING local officials in Georgia from requiring masks in grocery stores, restaurants, bars, shops, and public buildings.**

_Amid skyrocketing COVID-19 hospitalizations in Georgia, and with over 3,000 deaths statewide, Georgia's Governor is ignoring public health experts and banning LOCAL OFFICIALS from putting common-sense mask requirements in place._

**Jon Ossoff thinks the Governor's actions are _inexplicable_ and _unconscionable_. Do you agree?**

| [SIGN JON'S PETITION NOW](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e212b/5b2c1286/3dd9fd9d/25f1601c/2415898696/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/face-mask-ban")
---
Gov. Kemp is dancing to Donald Trump's tune, and we know the President has no interest in containing the coronavirus. He "hopes it will just disappear."

During his taxpayer-funded visit to Atlanta Wednesday, a maskless Trump practically ignored the pandemic and instead lavished praise on Kemp and Jon's opponent, GOP Sen. David Perdue.

**Earlier that day, Perdue told CNBC he thought "things in Georgia right now are going as well as they could be expected."**

For Perdue to say things are "going as well as they could be expected" is a slap in the face to the millions of Georgians who have been infected, lost their jobs, or face eviction, foreclosure, or bankruptcy as a result of the mismanagement of this public health and economic crisis.

_The remarks left the CNBC anchor "baffled."_

**Friend, we deserve better than the failed leadership of Trump, Kemp, and Perdue.**

Jon Ossoff will put health and safety first, and lead with facts and science instead of cowering to an incompetent demagogue president.

**[Please, sign Jon's petition calling for mask orders to stay in effect in Georgia during this pandemic.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e212b/5b2c1286/3dd9fd9d/25f1601c/2415898696/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/face-mask-ban")**

| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e212b/5b2c1286/3dd9fd9d/25f1601c/2415898696/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/face-mask-ban")
---
In this together,

Team Ossoff

body:
As we approach 100 days to Election Day, we all have to make sure we keep our own grassroots fundraising operation running at full-steam. |
---
Peter, we need another 5850 donations from Pennsylvania before Sunday night in preparation for our 100 days milestone. [Can you chip in $5 or any amount to help us get there?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.22_B2_trumpfr_X__F1_S1_C1__full_t1&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.22_B2_trumpfr_X__F1_S1_C1__full_t1")

Now, here's why we're asking, Peter.

After we outraised Donald Trump two months in a row and closed the cash-on-hand gap by a $100 million in the second quarter, he's ramping things up. Just take a look at a couple of the latest Trump fundraising developments:
1. In a fundraiser held earlier this week at Trump International Hotel Washington, Trump and Republicans were expected to raise $5 million in a single night.

2. At the end of the month, Trump will travel to Florida (a COVID-19 hotspot) to hold in-person fundraising events, including one at his own golf resort.

Look, Trump's fundraising events present clear conflicts of interest, on top of ignoring social distancing guidelines. But, we still have to fight back against the big sum of money we can expect him to raise.

So as we approach 100 days to Election Day, we all have to make sure we keep our own grassroots fundraising operation running at full-steam. **That 's why it's imperative that we have the resources to win, and we can't miss any fundraising goals along the way.**

[So, Peter, now that you know why it's so important that we reach this 100 days goal, can you be one of the 5850 donations we need from Pennsylvania before Sunday night? [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8b2/1cd0ac28/172cd0bb0/357da965/4257503582/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

In a fundraiser held earlier this week at Trump International Hotel Washington, Trump and Republicans were expected to raise $5 million in a single night. 2. At the end of the month, Trump will travel to Florida (a COVID-19 hotspot) to hold in-person fundraising events, including one at his own golf resort. Look, Trump's fundraising events present clear conflicts of interest, on top of ignoring social distancing guidelines. But, we still have to fight back against the big sum of money we can expect him to raise. name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana - best reasons to wear a mask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Today, Eric issued a statewide mask mandate in order to keep at-risk Hoosiers safe and help our recovery along. Here’s what he had to say: [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=75a989b90eab43b5a8400fa136b988b7&_e=6bxqAXfJZNowqDepATwsUcfeNb0wbqdS4Oie2WlUwDDNd6Crok6Ix_CBFL9DA8fFEmdcTGRCB6j1dyP0J5LPpqLQmrE-LWELOcJY2ozCknBjVl5hq93mq33fAh52giTNOCiM3qSMAwllUgdoUz1dWFaM3Hi9wWxXF4Ou7pjKPsQ5Y_LPOEXYxkfsr07XSbdgNM8QrcKW-zQT6yjMhwX5rdweyResklsg_0NmpsbnjERX6OLKcTHu_5HxZYtHNn3BQ6g_n9JpQGpSuYqcZ3hKuqM2RyTryciLlhqQeVXnvukAoo66rjKngiyT-LBwQI_m8Ht5LzXkrosniGl5waAQ5W4RbYsbo5ToDQF77OMCPT7fgDJDuLgvtSLoXdR_2NoK0N1luKrGf2kKAQAB7ow8F0sUU1_Ur1NXYL-03TqWwBo96z9ObbbkoBSp7V3lJJiNZCcP1YMeaEUsqfKyFSzumBjWnyS9bb_r4aZqBPYF_nE%3D) Friend, It’s time to mask up, Hoosiers!
Today, Eric issued a statewide mask mandate in order to keep at-risk Hoosiers safe and help our recovery along. Here’s what he had to say: _“When I asked you months ago to hunker down, you did. We did. We slowed the spread. It's just factual. We protected our hospitals. While we have continued to fare better than many other states, now we have to hunker down in a different way. Which is why wearing masks will become the fashion of the day.” - Governor Eric Holcomb_ Wearing your mask is an easy way to make sure Hoosiers stay healthy, our businesses stay open, and our students can safely return to school when the time comes.
Many Indiana counties are already under local mask ordinances and the governor’s statewide mandate will be**effective for the rest of the state on Monday, July 27. **
We had our team pull together the best reasons to wear a mask, but we want to hear your reasons, too! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=75a989b90eab43b5a8400fa136b988b7&_e=6bxqAXfJZNowqDepATwsUcfeNb0wbqdS4Oie2WlUwDDNd6Crok6Ix_CBFL9DA8fFEmdcTGRCB6j1dyP0J5LPpqLQmrE-LWELOcJY2ozCknBjVl5hq93mq33fAh52giTNOCiM3qSMAwllUgdoUz1dWFaM3Hi9wWxXF4Ou7pjKPsQ5Y_LPOEXYxkfsr07XSbdgNM8QrcKW-zQT6yjMhwX5rdweyResklsg_0NmpsbnjERX6OLKcTHu_5HxZYtHNn3BQ6g_n9JpQGpSuYqcZ3hKun3b846qb0ayFIUUjsZgdfL_k7NbG_lJ4SW_Vg-fO2NaeQm3szUSOdug-esRCh5nHUH_nj9E2oTABDdaZLTM9cKdFKIh90-Umiy6gCCiD5i7F3Z_QwFjb4mgDDYFu9lpRw-SnDfKvDQ80abqoTgO3MamSxKDdo9_ApYOf7iQsLAowFB6aLdQUyn_kQ-Whm8WCtC3zlGw_XyonR9QRcky-48%3D)
* **Slow the spread** \- This one’s basic, but incredibly important. Face coverings can and do blunt the spread of COVID-19. It’s that simple.
* **Keep our businesses open** \- Our local businesses are always there for us, and we need to be there for them. The better we are about wearing masks, the more businesses can stay open and the better off our economy will be.
* **Protect at-risk Hoosiers** \- Wearing a mask helps keep Hoosiers who are at-risk for COVID-19 safe. Being a good neighbor starts with wearing a mask!
* **Keep your family safe** \- Nothing is more important than protecting your loved ones, and Eric’s mask mandate is helping keep them safe.
* **Get Hoosier students back to school** \- Hoosier students are counting on us to be responsible and wear masks. The more people wear masks, the faster they’ll be able to get back in the classroom.

Why are we doing this? Eric pointed to several reasons that a statewide mask mandate is now needed:
* We’ve seen an increase in the COVID-19 positivity rate.
* Hospitalizations related to COVID-19 have been ticking up.
* Surrounding states are seeing an increase in positive COVID-19 cases.

Wearing masks is a safe and simple way to slow the spread of COVID-19.
**Please be a part of the solution and wear a mask.**
What’s your number one reason for wearing a mask? Share it with us below! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=75a989b90eab43b5a8400fa136b988b7&_e=6bxqAXfJZNowqDepATwsUcfeNb0wbqdS4Oie2WlUwDDNd6Crok6Ix_CBFL9DA8fFEmdcTGRCB6j1dyP0J5LPpqLQmrE-LWELOcJY2ozCknBjVl5hq93mq33fAh52giTNOCiM3qSMAwllUgdoUz1dWFaM3Hi9wWxXF4Ou7pjKPsQ5Y_LPOEXYxkfsr07XSbdgNM8QrcKW-zQT6yjMhwX5rdweyResklsg_0NmpsbnjERX6OLKcTHu_5HxZYtHNn3BQ6g_n9JpQGpSuYqcZ3hKusl-kLqk_JmcftQhtlQJE1BzzYz3Zd7WJ4NWKq0i0b-e09riiAwHGc-VM9AKNCpoRkdQ7LrWfD6zzuO6DIujsUzgvf3WFq0VzGc1PDs-yOuxDzaIEOTc0kFKG-nMpwGPUn0FTG9gL_XiB7anireRD_t2NbV6Qf9iIHjRfyD95l68gcARnsjUwScKbpiIQQkzCAU4F9LwWtSPXjQeTm6alTw%3D) Thanks for reading — we’ll be in touch soon. -Your Holcomb Crew |
---
|
|
| |
---

|

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: urgent (need your help)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
---
| | Friend, I wouldn't email unless it were incredibly important, so believe me when I tell you:

**Kelly Loeffler 's shameful attacks on the Black Lives Matter movement are nothing more than an effort to sow division, keep Georgia's Senate seat red and protect Mitch McConnell's extremist majority.**
---
There's something happening in Georgia, and across the country. But both of my opponents - Sen. Loeffler and Rep. Collins - are extreme Republicans who are more concerned with their political future than the future of the next generation. What happens here in Georgia could decide which party controls the Senate, and with polls showing this race statistically tied, McConnell and the GOP have never been more vulnerable. But I need your help:
Loeffler is spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat, and McConnell-linked dark money groups are flooding this race with millions more. This could ruin our chance to take back the Senate for Democrats unless we raise another $9,328 by midnight tonight - and with just hours to go, we're still falling dangerously short.
**Here's the thing: If everyone reading this email chipped in even just a few dollars now, we'd hit our goal in minutes. But I know not everyone will, so I'm personally asking if I can count on you, friend:[Please, can you give $5 or more now to help us flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e584/288179be/9f9ec4d/348e7882/1123269855/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzg2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk386-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for all that you do - I'm grateful for your support.

Raphael Warnock

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW: President Trump announces actions to restore safety and peace in U.S. cities
body:
On June 29, 4-year-old LeGend Taliferro was shot and killed in his bed after a gunman opened fire on an apartment complex in Kansas City, Missouri. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1ee82d29b0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 22, 2020
---
| | |
# **NEW: President Trump announces actions to restore safety and peace in U.S. cities**

**On June 29,** 4-year-old LeGend Taliferro was shot and killed in his bed after a gunman opened fire on an apartment complex in Kansas City, Missouri.

**This afternoon, President Trump** announced the expansion of Operation Legend, an interagency law enforcement effort led by the Department of Justice and named after LeGend. Its purpose is to quell the unacceptable levels of recent violence in U.S. cities.

**“My first duty** as President is to protect the American people, and today I am taking action to fulfill that sacred obligation,” President Trump said.

🎬 [**President Trump: Anti-police policy and rhetoric has consequences**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=00da9aadec&e=3ee4985eea)

**Attorney General Bill Barr** announced the creation of Operation Legend fewer than 10 days after LeGend’s heartbreaking death. The Justice Department is now surging over 200 federal law enforcement officers into Kansas City to help curb the kind of senseless violence that took the young boy’s life.

**The President** announced today that the operation will expand into Chicago and Albuquerque. Over the next 3 weeks, the Justice Department plans to further expand the initiative into Cleveland, Detroit, and Milwaukee.

**In Chicago** , for example, more than 300 federal law enforcement personnel will work with state and local police to help apprehend violent criminals. Just yesterday, another mass shooting in Chicago injured 15 people outside of a funeral service.

**More than $61 million** will be provided by the Justice Department to hire hundreds of new police officers, and about 200 federal agents and deputy marshals will be permanently reassigned to Operation Legend cities.

**“We will never defund** the police—we will hire more great police,” President Trump said. “We want to make law enforcement stronger, not weaker. What cities are doing is absolute insanity.”

[**Watch: For decades, politicians have failed law-abiding citizens**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4616349c2f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump: ‘We’re very close to the vaccine’**

**President Trump briefed** Americans last night on our continued nationwide fight against the Coronavirus. As a result of the Administration’s quick, aggressive response to recent hotspots, there are currently no unfilled equipment requests from governors.

**Cases requiring hospitalizations** continue to drop, and fatalities have fallen by 75 percent since mid-April. The Administration is working with numerous partners to accelerate the development of a vaccine, and two possibilities will reach their final stage of clinical trials this month. “This was achieved in record time,” President Trump said.

🎬 [**President Trump: Case fatality rates continue to decline**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=503ee1a8c6&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Ultimately our goal** is not merely to manage the pandemic, but to end it. We want to get rid of it as soon as we can,” the President said. “That is why getting a vaccine remains a top priority.”

**He also urged** Americans to continue to socially distance—and to wear masks whenever social distancing isn’t possible. “We are imploring young Americans to avoid packed bars and other crowded indoor gatherings. Be safe and be smart,” he said.

[**Watch: “When you are not able to socially distance, wear a mask”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=64534fe994&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---

---

clean_body: On June 29, 4-year-old LeGend Taliferro was shot and killed in his bed after a gunman opened fire on an apartment complex in Kansas City, Missouri. | | | | | The White House • July 22, 2020 | | | NEW: President Trump announces actions to restore safety and peace in U.S. cities On June 29, 4-year-old LeGend Taliferro was shot and killed in his bed after a gunman opened fire on an apartment complex in Kansas City, Missouri. This afternoon, President Trump announced the expansion of Operation Legend, an interagency law enforcement effort led by the Department of Justice and named after LeGend. Its purpose is to quell the unacceptable levels of recent violence in U.S. cities. “My first duty as President is to protect the American people, and today I am taking action to fulfill that sacred obligation,” President Trump said. 🎬 Attorney General Bill Barr announced the creation of Operation Legend fewer than 10 days after LeGend’s heartbreaking death. The Justice Department is now surging over 200 federal law enforcement officers into Kansas City to help curb the kind of senseless violence that took the young boy’s life. The President announced today that the operation will expand into Chicago and Albuquerque. Over the next 3 weeks, the Justice Department plans to further expand the initiative into Cleveland, Detroit, and Milwaukee. In Chicago , for example, more than 300 federal law enforcement personnel will work with state and local police to help apprehend violent criminals. Just yesterday, another mass shooting in Chicago injured 15 people outside of a funeral service. More than $61 million will be provided by the Justice Department to hire hundreds of new police officers, and about 200 federal agents and deputy marshals will be permanently reassigned to Operation Legend cities. “We will never defund the police—we will hire more great police,” President Trump said. “We want to make law enforcement stronger, not weaker. What cities are doing is absolute insanity.” | | President Trump: ‘We’re very close to the vaccine’ President Trump briefed Americans last night on our continued nationwide fight against the Coronavirus. As a result of the Administration’s quick, aggressive response to recent hotspots, there are currently no unfilled equipment requests from governors. Cases requiring hospitalizations continue to drop, and fatalities have fallen by 75 percent since mid-April. The Administration is working with numerous partners to accelerate the development of a vaccine, and two possibilities will reach their final stage of clinical trials this month. “This was achieved in record time,” President Trump said. 🎬 “Ultimately our goal is not merely to manage the pandemic, but to end it. We want to get rid of it as soon as we can,” the President said. “That is why getting a vaccine remains a top priority.” He also urged Americans to continue to socially distance—and to wear masks whenever social distancing isn’t possible. “We are imploring young Americans to avoid packed bars and other crowded indoor gatherings. Be safe and be smart,” he said. | | Photo of the Day | | President Trump announces the expansion of Operation Legend | July 22, 2020 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

body:
| Derek- Granite Staters deserve to know what their elected officials stand for.

That’s why I asked my primary challenger to a series of debates – transparency that YOU deserve. **Yet despite sending this request to Matt Mowers’ apartment in New York City, his million-dollar condo in Washington, DC, and his rental apartment in NH, all we’ve heard are crickets.** ****It’s truly disappointing that Mowers has yet to agree to even a single debate. Where does he stand? What does he support – or not? Who knows! That’s why I’m so adamant that we have a series of debates. We owe it to you, and we owe it to our country. Can you chip in $10 today and help put pressure on Mowers to respond? If he doesn’t respond in the next week, we’ll be forced to run ads on TV to make sure New Hampshire knows where Mowers stands. [_Here's the secure contribution link_](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDcxMjA4MTA0MDMxOTUwMDYyJmM9eTRyNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzUxMDYyMDcmZD1oMXI0eDJ1.LNuMQcmkOL2pKYkUkNmxp3HQxIn53fixUBxfeYHwmuI) Remember: Mowers was sent to New Hampshire from New Jersey to run here with big, swampy donors who hope you don’t ask too many questions about his past or how long he’s lived in the Granite State. I’ve lived here my entire adult life and share our Granite State values, and we HAVE to put pressure on Mowers to respond. We HAVE to make a stand on this issue, and we need your help to do it. _[Will you help me out today?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDcxMjA4MTA0MDMxOTUwMDYyJmM9eTRyNSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzUxMDYyMTMmZD1nOGY4ejh3._HdianNeeNtMzC5MAO36hhXjdMV9cwauGaXeRu3geWk)_ Thank you,

-Matt Mayberry
